        -- ingestion / source
        p.inserted_at,
        p.transformed_at_silver

    FROM pers_agg p
    LEFT JOIN receb r   ON r.perdcomp_number = p.perdcomp_number
                       AND r.amount          = p.amount_requested

    WHERE NULLIF(p.amount_office_compensation, 0) IS NOT NULL

),

-- ============================================================
-- CTE 3: Restituição/Ressarcimento
-- 1 linha por PERDCOMP; amount = pers.amount_restituted_reimbursed
-- ============================================================
restituicao AS (

    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN p.rectifying_perdcomp_number IS NULL THEN p.perdcomp_number
            ELSE p.rectifying_perdcomp_number
        END                                                 AS perdcomp_id,
        CASE
            WHEN NULLIF(p.amount_compensated, 0) IS NOT NULL THEN 'Compensação'
            ELSE 'Restituição/Ressarcimento'
        END                                                 AS perdcomp_type,

        p.amount_restituted_reimbursed                      AS amount_compensated,

        -- pers columns
        p.perdcomp_number,
        p.rectifying_perdcomp_number,
        p.partner_name,
        p.attorney_name,
        p.technical_responsible,
        p.user_name,
        p.cnpj,
        p.company_name,
        p.thesis,
        p.type                                              AS perdcomp_type_raw,
        p.tax_type                                          AS perdcomp_tax_type,
        p.month_quarter,
        p.year,
        p.status                                            AS perdcomp_status,
        p.date_request,
        p.date_notice,
        p.amount_requested,
        p.amount_selic_office,
        p.amount_office_compensation,

        -- dcomp columns (vazio)
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_id,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_reference_period,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_status,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_tax_type,
        CAST(NULL AS date)                                  AS date_compensated,
        CAST(NULL AS decimal(18,2))                         AS amount_selic_update,

        -- date_compensation
        CASE
            WHEN p.date_notice IS NOT NULL THEN p.date_notice
            ELSE                                r.date_receipt_period
        END                                                 AS date_compensation,

        p.amount_selic                                      AS amount_selic,

        -- ingestion / source
        p.inserted_at,
        p.transformed_at_silver

    FROM pers_agg p
    LEFT JOIN receb r   ON r.perdcomp_number = p.perdcomp_number
                       AND r.amount          = p.amount_requested

    WHERE NULLIF(p.amount_restituted_reimbursed, 0) IS NOT NULL

),

-- ============================================================
-- CTE 4: Indeferimento
-- 1 linha por PERDCOMP; amount = pers.amount_denial
-- ============================================================
indeferimento AS (

    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN p.rectifying_perdcomp_number IS NULL THEN p.perdcomp_number
            ELSE p.rectifying_perdcomp_number
        END                                                 AS perdcomp_id,
        'Indeferimento'                                     AS perdcomp_type,

        p.amount_denial                                     AS amount_compensated,

        -- pers columns
        p.perdcomp_number,
        p.rectifying_perdcomp_number,
        p.partner_name,
        p.attorney_name,
        p.technical_responsible,
        p.user_name,
        p.cnpj,
        p.company_name,
        p.thesis,
        p.type                                              AS perdcomp_type_raw,
        p.tax_type                                          AS perdcomp_tax_type,
        p.month_quarter,
        p.year,
        p.status                                            AS perdcomp_status,
        p.date_request,
        p.date_notice,
        p.amount_requested,
        p.amount_selic_office,
        p.amount_office_compensation,

        -- dcomp columns (vazio)
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_id,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_reference_period,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_status,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_tax_type,
        CAST(NULL AS date)                                  AS date_compensated,
        CAST(NULL AS decimal(18,2))                         AS amount_selic_update,

        -- date_compensation
        CASE
            WHEN p.date_notice IS NOT NULL THEN p.date_notice
            ELSE                                r.date_receipt_period
        END                                                 AS date_compensation,

        p.amount_selic                                      AS amount_selic,

        -- ingestion / source
        p.inserted_at,
        p.transformed_at_silver

    FROM pers_agg p
    LEFT JOIN receb r   ON r.perdcomp_number = p.perdcomp_number
                       AND r.amount          = p.amount_requested

    WHERE NULLIF(p.amount_denial, 0) IS NOT NULL

),

-- ============================================================
-- CTE 5: Selic
-- 1 linha por PERDCOMP; amount = pers.amount_selic
-- ============================================================
selic AS (

    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN p.rectifying_perdcomp_number IS NULL THEN p.perdcomp_number
            ELSE p.rectifying_perdcomp_number
        END                                                 AS perdcomp_id,
        'Selic'                                             AS perdcomp_type,

        p.amount_selic_compensated                          AS amount_compensated,

        -- pers columns
        p.perdcomp_number,
        p.rectifying_perdcomp_number,
        p.partner_name,
        p.attorney_name,
        p.technical_responsible,
        p.user_name,
        p.cnpj,
        p.company_name,
        p.thesis,
        p.type                                              AS perdcomp_type_raw,
        p.tax_type                                          AS perdcomp_tax_type,
        p.month_quarter,
        p.year,
        p.status                                            AS perdcomp_status,
        p.date_request,
        p.date_notice,
        p.amount_requested,
        p.amount_selic_office,
        p.amount_office_compensation,

        -- dcomp columns (vazio)
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_id,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_reference_period,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_status,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_tax_type,
        CAST(NULL AS date)                                  AS date_compensated,
        CAST(NULL AS decimal(18,2))                         AS amount_selic_update,

        -- date_compensation
        CASE
            WHEN p.date_notice IS NOT NULL THEN p.date_notice
            ELSE                                r.date_receipt_period
        END                                                 AS date_compensation,

        p.amount_selic                                      AS amount_selic,

        -- ingestion / source
        p.inserted_at,
        p.transformed_at_silver

    FROM pers_agg p
    LEFT JOIN receb r   ON r.perdcomp_number = p.perdcomp_number
                       AND r.amount          = p.amount_requested

    WHERE NULLIF(p.amount_selic, 0) IS NOT NULL

),

-- ============================================================
-- UNION ALL: consolida todos os tipos em uma única tabela
-- ============================================================
compilado AS (

    SELECT * FROM compensacao
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM compensacao_oficio
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM restituicao
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM indeferimento
    --UNION ALL
    --SELECT * FROM selic

),

total AS (

    SELECT
        perdcomp_id,
        perdcomp_type,
        perdcomp_type_raw,
        perdcomp_number,
        rectifying_perdcomp_number,
        dcomp_id,
        dcomp_reference_period,
        perdcomp_status,
        dcomp_status,
        perdcomp_tax_type,
        dcomp_tax_type,
        thesis,
        month_quarter,
        year,
        cnpj,
        company_name,
        partner_name,
        attorney_name,
        technical_responsible,
        user_name,
        date_request,
        date_compensation,

        -- dias até esta compensação/parcela
        DATEDIFF(day, date_request, date_compensation)              AS days_to_compensation,

        -- primeira data de benefício por perdcomp + tipo
        MIN(date_compensation) OVER (
            PARTITION BY perdcomp_id, perdcomp_type
        )                                                           AS date_first_benefit,

        -- dias até o primeiro benefício
        DATEDIFF(
            day,
            date_request,
            MIN(date_compensation) OVER (PARTITION BY perdcomp_id, perdcomp_type)
        )                                                           AS days_to_first_benefit,

        -- amount_requested: exibir uma vez por perdcomp × tipo (evita duplo-contagem)
        CASE
            WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY perdcomp_id, perdcomp_type
                ORDER BY date_compensation ASC
            ) = 1 THEN amount_requested
            ELSE NULL
        END                                                         AS amount_requested,

        amount_compensated,
        amount_selic,

        -- classificação por faixa de valor requerido
        CASE
            WHEN amount_requested >= 1000000                        THEN 'Acima 1 Milhão'
            WHEN amount_requested BETWEEN 500000  AND 1000000       THEN 'Entre 500 Mil - 1 Milhão'
            WHEN amount_requested BETWEEN 200000  AND 500000        THEN 'Entre 200 Mil - 500 Mil'
            WHEN amount_requested BETWEEN 50000   AND 200000        THEN 'Entre 50 Mil - 200 Mil'
            WHEN amount_requested BETWEEN 10000   AND 50000         THEN 'Entre 10 Mil - 50 Mil'
            ELSE                                                         'Até 10 Mil'
        END                                                         AS range_amount_requested,

        -- acumulado de compensação por perdcomp + tipo (ordem cronológica crescente)
        SUM(amount_compensated) OVER (
            PARTITION BY perdcomp_id, perdcomp_type
            ORDER BY date_compensation ASC
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        )                                                           AS amount_compensated_cumulative,

        -- saldo = requerido total - compensado acumulado
        MAX(amount_requested) OVER (PARTITION BY perdcomp_id, perdcomp_type)
        - SUM(amount_compensated) OVER (
            PARTITION BY perdcomp_id, perdcomp_type
            ORDER BY date_compensation ASC
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
          )                                                         AS amount_compensation_balance,

        -- ingestion / source
        inserted_at,
        transformed_at_silver,

        dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)                        AS transformed_at_gold

    FROM compilado

),

exito AS (

    -- primeiro momento em que o saldo zerou por perdcomp + tipo
    SELECT
        perdcomp_id,
        perdcomp_type,
        MIN(date_compensation)                                      AS date_closed
    FROM total
    WHERE amount_compensation_balance <= 0
    GROUP BY perdcomp_id, perdcomp_type

),

final AS (

    SELECT
        t.*,
        e.date_closed,
        DATEDIFF(day, t.date_request, e.date_closed)                AS days_to_closed,
        CASE WHEN e.date_closed IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END       AS is_closed

    FROM total t

    LEFT JOIN exito e
        ON e.perdcomp_id    = t.perdcomp_id
       AND e.perdcomp_type  = t.perdcomp_type

)

SELECT *
FROM final
model.save_data.f_excel_tax_recovery.compiled_code:
WITH pers AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM "save_database"."silver"."silver_excel_control_pers"

),

dcomps AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM "save_database"."silver"."silver_excel_control_dcomps"

),

receb AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM "save_database"."silver"."silver_excel_reimbursements_rt"

),

-- ============================================================
-- Pré-agregação do PERS:
--   amounts: somados por perdcomp_number (Verbas Indenizatórias entra no total)
--   campos descritivos: da linha principal (thesis <> 'Verbas Indenizatorias (Cla)')
--   caso só exista a linha de Verbas, ela mesma é usada como fallback
-- ============================================================
pers_amounts AS (

    SELECT
        perdcomp_number,
        SUM(amount_compensated)             AS amount_compensated,
        SUM(amount_office_compensation)     AS amount_office_compensation,
        SUM(amount_restituted_reimbursed)   AS amount_restituted_reimbursed,
        SUM(amount_denial)                  AS amount_denial,
        SUM(amount_selic)                   AS amount_selic,
        SUM(amount_selic_compensated)       AS amount_selic_compensated,
        SUM(amount_selic_office)            AS amount_selic_office,
        SUM(amount_requested)               AS amount_requested
    FROM pers
    GROUP BY perdcomp_number

),

pers_info AS (

    -- linha principal: prefere registros que não sejam Verbas Indenizatórias
    -- se só existir Verbas, ROW_NUMBER = 1 garante pelo menos uma linha
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY perdcomp_number
                ORDER BY
                    CASE
                        WHEN UPPER(TRIM(thesis)) LIKE '%VERBAS INDENIZAT%' THEN 1
                        ELSE 0
                    END ASC,
                    perdcomp_number ASC
            ) AS rn_info
        FROM pers
    ) ranked
    WHERE rn_info = 1

),

-- junta campos descritivos (pers_info) com amounts agregados (pers_amounts)
pers_agg AS (

    SELECT
        -- identification
        i.perdcomp_number,
        i.rectifying_perdcomp_number,

        -- ownership
        i.partner_name,
        i.attorney_name,
        i.technical_responsible,
        i.user_name,

        -- company
        i.cnpj,
        i.company_name,

        -- tax attributes
        i.thesis,
        i.type,
        i.tax_type,
        i.month_quarter,
        i.year,
        i.status,

        -- dates
        i.date_request,
        i.date_notice,

        -- amounts (agregados)
        a.amount_requested,
        a.amount_compensated,
        a.amount_office_compensation,
        a.amount_restituted_reimbursed,
        a.amount_denial,
        a.amount_selic,
        a.amount_selic_compensated,
        a.amount_selic_office,

        -- ingestion / source
        i.inserted_at,
        i.transformed_at_silver

    FROM pers_info i
    INNER JOIN pers_amounts a ON a.perdcomp_number = i.perdcomp_number

),

-- ============================================================
-- CTE 1: Compensação
-- cada registro DCOMP = uma parcela; amount = dcomps.amount_compensated
-- ============================================================
compensacao AS (

    SELECT
        -- identification
        CASE
            WHEN p.rectifying_perdcomp_number IS NULL THEN p.perdcomp_number
            ELSE p.rectifying_perdcomp_number
        END                                                 AS perdcomp_id,
        'Compensação'                                       AS perdcomp_type,

        -- amount desta linha: valor da parcela DCOMP (ou pers quando sem dcomp)
        COALESCE(d.amount_compensated, p.amount_compensated) AS amount_compensated,

        -- pers columns
        p.perdcomp_number,
        p.rectifying_perdcomp_number,
        p.partner_name,
        p.attorney_name,
        p.technical_responsible,
        p.user_name,
        p.cnpj,
        p.company_name,
        p.thesis,
        p.type                                              AS perdcomp_type_raw,
        p.tax_type                                          AS perdcomp_tax_type,
        p.month_quarter,
        p.year,
        p.status                                            AS perdcomp_status,
        p.date_request,
        p.date_notice,
        p.amount_requested,
        p.amount_selic_office,
        p.amount_office_compensation,

        -- dcomp columns
        CASE
            WHEN d.rectifying_dcomp_number IS NULL THEN d.dcomp_number
            ELSE d.rectifying_dcomp_number
        END                                                 AS dcomp_id,
        d.reference_pers                                    AS dcomp_reference_period,
        d.status                                            AS dcomp_status,
        d.tax_type                                          AS dcomp_tax_type,
        d.date_compensated,
        d.amount_selic_update,

        -- date_compensation: dcomp → aviso pers → recebimento
        CASE
            WHEN d.date_compensated IS NOT NULL THEN d.date_compensated
            WHEN p.date_notice IS NOT NULL      THEN p.date_notice
            ELSE                                     r.date_receipt_period
        END                                                 AS date_compensation,

        -- selic
        COALESCE(d.amount_selic_update, p.amount_selic)     AS amount_selic,

        -- ingestion / source
        p.inserted_at,
        p.transformed_at_silver

    FROM pers_agg p
    LEFT JOIN dcomps d  ON d.reference_pers  = p.perdcomp_number
    LEFT JOIN receb r   ON r.perdcomp_number = p.perdcomp_number
                       AND r.amount          = p.amount_requested

    WHERE NULLIF(p.amount_compensated, 0) IS NOT NULL

),

-- ============================================================
-- CTE 2: Compensação De Ofício
-- 1 linha por PERDCOMP; amount = pers.amount_office_compensation
-- ============================================================
compensacao_oficio AS (

    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN p.rectifying_perdcomp_number IS NULL THEN p.perdcomp_number
            ELSE p.rectifying_perdcomp_number
        END                                                 AS perdcomp_id,
        'Compensação De Ofício'                             AS perdcomp_type,

        p.amount_office_compensation                        AS amount_compensated,

        -- pers columns
        p.perdcomp_number,
        p.rectifying_perdcomp_number,
        p.partner_name,
        p.attorney_name,
        p.technical_responsible,
        p.user_name,
        p.cnpj,
        p.company_name,
        p.thesis,
        p.type                                              AS perdcomp_type_raw,
        p.tax_type                                          AS perdcomp_tax_type,
        p.month_quarter,
        p.year,
        p.status                                            AS perdcomp_status,
        p.date_request,
        p.date_notice,
        p.amount_requested,
        p.amount_selic_office,
        p.amount_office_compensation,

        -- dcomp columns (vazio — tipo sem histórico DCOMP)
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_id,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_reference_period,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_status,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_tax_type,
        CAST(NULL AS date)                                  AS date_compensated,
        CAST(NULL AS decimal(18,2))                         AS amount_selic_update,

        -- date_compensation: aviso pers → recebimento
        CASE
            WHEN p.date_notice IS NOT NULL THEN p.date_notice
            ELSE                                r.date_receipt_period
        END                                                 AS date_compensation,

        -- selic: ofício usa coluna específica
        p.amount_selic_office                               AS amount_selic,

        -- ingestion / source
        p.inserted_at,
        p.transformed_at_silver

    FROM pers_agg p
    LEFT JOIN receb r   ON r.perdcomp_number = p.perdcomp_number
                       AND r.amount          = p.amount_requested

    WHERE NULLIF(p.amount_office_compensation, 0) IS NOT NULL

),

-- ============================================================
-- CTE 3: Restituição/Ressarcimento
-- 1 linha por PERDCOMP; amount = pers.amount_restituted_reimbursed
-- ============================================================
restituicao AS (

    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN p.rectifying_perdcomp_number IS NULL THEN p.perdcomp_number
            ELSE p.rectifying_perdcomp_number
        END                                                 AS perdcomp_id,
        CASE
            WHEN NULLIF(p.amount_compensated, 0) IS NOT NULL THEN 'Compensação'
            ELSE 'Restituição/Ressarcimento'
        END                                                 AS perdcomp_type,

        p.amount_restituted_reimbursed                      AS amount_compensated,

        -- pers columns
        p.perdcomp_number,
        p.rectifying_perdcomp_number,
        p.partner_name,
        p.attorney_name,
        p.technical_responsible,
        p.user_name,
        p.cnpj,
        p.company_name,
        p.thesis,
        p.type                                              AS perdcomp_type_raw,
        p.tax_type                                          AS perdcomp_tax_type,
        p.month_quarter,
        p.year,
        p.status                                            AS perdcomp_status,
        p.date_request,
        p.date_notice,
        p.amount_requested,
        p.amount_selic_office,
        p.amount_office_compensation,

        -- dcomp columns (vazio)
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_id,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_reference_period,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_status,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_tax_type,
        CAST(NULL AS date)                                  AS date_compensated,
        CAST(NULL AS decimal(18,2))                         AS amount_selic_update,

        -- date_compensation
        CASE
            WHEN p.date_notice IS NOT NULL THEN p.date_notice
            ELSE                                r.date_receipt_period
        END                                                 AS date_compensation,

        p.amount_selic                                      AS amount_selic,

        -- ingestion / source
        p.inserted_at,
        p.transformed_at_silver

    FROM pers_agg p
    LEFT JOIN receb r   ON r.perdcomp_number = p.perdcomp_number
                       AND r.amount          = p.amount_requested

    WHERE NULLIF(p.amount_restituted_reimbursed, 0) IS NOT NULL

),

-- ============================================================
-- CTE 4: Indeferimento
-- 1 linha por PERDCOMP; amount = pers.amount_denial
-- ============================================================
indeferimento AS (

    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN p.rectifying_perdcomp_number IS NULL THEN p.perdcomp_number
            ELSE p.rectifying_perdcomp_number
        END                                                 AS perdcomp_id,
        'Indeferimento'                                     AS perdcomp_type,

        p.amount_denial                                     AS amount_compensated,

        -- pers columns
        p.perdcomp_number,
        p.rectifying_perdcomp_number,
        p.partner_name,
        p.attorney_name,
        p.technical_responsible,
        p.user_name,
        p.cnpj,
        p.company_name,
        p.thesis,
        p.type                                              AS perdcomp_type_raw,
        p.tax_type                                          AS perdcomp_tax_type,
        p.month_quarter,
        p.year,
        p.status                                            AS perdcomp_status,
        p.date_request,
        p.date_notice,
        p.amount_requested,
        p.amount_selic_office,
        p.amount_office_compensation,

        -- dcomp columns (vazio)
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_id,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_reference_period,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_status,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_tax_type,
        CAST(NULL AS date)                                  AS date_compensated,
        CAST(NULL AS decimal(18,2))                         AS amount_selic_update,

        -- date_compensation
        CASE
            WHEN p.date_notice IS NOT NULL THEN p.date_notice
            ELSE                                r.date_receipt_period
        END                                                 AS date_compensation,

        p.amount_selic                                      AS amount_selic,

        -- ingestion / source
        p.inserted_at,
        p.transformed_at_silver

    FROM pers_agg p
    LEFT JOIN receb r   ON r.perdcomp_number = p.perdcomp_number
                       AND r.amount          = p.amount_requested

    WHERE NULLIF(p.amount_denial, 0) IS NOT NULL

),

-- ============================================================
-- CTE 5: Selic
-- 1 linha por PERDCOMP; amount = pers.amount_selic
-- ============================================================
selic AS (

    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN p.rectifying_perdcomp_number IS NULL THEN p.perdcomp_number
            ELSE p.rectifying_perdcomp_number
        END                                                 AS perdcomp_id,
        'Selic'                                             AS perdcomp_type,

        p.amount_selic_compensated                          AS amount_compensated,

        -- pers columns
        p.perdcomp_number,
        p.rectifying_perdcomp_number,
        p.partner_name,
        p.attorney_name,
        p.technical_responsible,
        p.user_name,
        p.cnpj,
        p.company_name,
        p.thesis,
        p.type                                              AS perdcomp_type_raw,
        p.tax_type                                          AS perdcomp_tax_type,
        p.month_quarter,
        p.year,
        p.status                                            AS perdcomp_status,
        p.date_request,
        p.date_notice,
        p.amount_requested,
        p.amount_selic_office,
        p.amount_office_compensation,

        -- dcomp columns (vazio)
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_id,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_reference_period,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_status,
        NULL                                                AS dcomp_tax_type,
        CAST(NULL AS date)                                  AS date_compensated,
        CAST(NULL AS decimal(18,2))                         AS amount_selic_update,

        -- date_compensation
        CASE
            WHEN p.date_notice IS NOT NULL THEN p.date_notice
            ELSE                                r.date_receipt_period
        END                                                 AS date_compensation,

        p.amount_selic                                      AS amount_selic,

        -- ingestion / source
        p.inserted_at,
        p.transformed_at_silver

    FROM pers_agg p
    LEFT JOIN receb r   ON r.perdcomp_number = p.perdcomp_number
                       AND r.amount          = p.amount_requested

    WHERE NULLIF(p.amount_selic, 0) IS NOT NULL

),

-- ============================================================
-- UNION ALL: consolida todos os tipos em uma única tabela
-- ============================================================
compilado AS (

    SELECT * FROM compensacao
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM compensacao_oficio
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM restituicao
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM indeferimento
    --UNION ALL
    --SELECT * FROM selic

),

total AS (

    SELECT
        perdcomp_id,
        perdcomp_type,
        perdcomp_type_raw,
        perdcomp_number,
        rectifying_perdcomp_number,
        dcomp_id,
        dcomp_reference_period,
        perdcomp_status,
        dcomp_status,
        perdcomp_tax_type,
        dcomp_tax_type,
        thesis,
        month_quarter,
        year,
        cnpj,
        company_name,
        partner_name,
        attorney_name,
        technical_responsible,
        user_name,
        date_request,
        date_compensation,

        -- dias até esta compensação/parcela
        DATEDIFF(day, date_request, date_compensation)              AS days_to_compensation,

        -- primeira data de benefício por perdcomp + tipo
        MIN(date_compensation) OVER (
            PARTITION BY perdcomp_id, perdcomp_type
        )                                                           AS date_first_benefit,

        -- dias até o primeiro benefício
        DATEDIFF(
            day,
            date_request,
            MIN(date_compensation) OVER (PARTITION BY perdcomp_id, perdcomp_type)
        )                                                           AS days_to_first_benefit,

        -- amount_requested: exibir uma vez por perdcomp × tipo (evita duplo-contagem)
        CASE
            WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY perdcomp_id, perdcomp_type
                ORDER BY date_compensation ASC
            ) = 1 THEN amount_requested
            ELSE NULL
        END                                                         AS amount_requested,

        amount_compensated,
        amount_selic,

        -- classificação por faixa de valor requerido
        CASE
            WHEN amount_requested >= 1000000                        THEN 'Acima 1 Milhão'
            WHEN amount_requested BETWEEN 500000  AND 1000000       THEN 'Entre 500 Mil - 1 Milhão'
            WHEN amount_requested BETWEEN 200000  AND 500000        THEN 'Entre 200 Mil - 500 Mil'
            WHEN amount_requested BETWEEN 50000   AND 200000        THEN 'Entre 50 Mil - 200 Mil'
            WHEN amount_requested BETWEEN 10000   AND 50000         THEN 'Entre 10 Mil - 50 Mil'
            ELSE                                                         'Até 10 Mil'
        END                                                         AS range_amount_requested,

        -- acumulado de compensação por perdcomp + tipo (ordem cronológica crescente)
        SUM(amount_compensated) OVER (
            PARTITION BY perdcomp_id, perdcomp_type
            ORDER BY date_compensation ASC
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        )                                                           AS amount_compensated_cumulative,

        -- saldo = requerido total - compensado acumulado
        MAX(amount_requested) OVER (PARTITION BY perdcomp_id, perdcomp_type)
        - SUM(amount_compensated) OVER (
            PARTITION BY perdcomp_id, perdcomp_type
            ORDER BY date_compensation ASC
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
          )                                                         AS amount_compensation_balance,

        -- ingestion / source
        inserted_at,
        transformed_at_silver,

        dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)                        AS transformed_at_gold

    FROM compilado

),

exito AS (

    -- primeiro momento em que o saldo zerou por perdcomp + tipo
    SELECT
        perdcomp_id,
        perdcomp_type,
        MIN(date_compensation)                                      AS date_closed
    FROM total
    WHERE amount_compensation_balance <= 0
    GROUP BY perdcomp_id, perdcomp_type

),

final AS (

    SELECT
        t.*,
        e.date_closed,
        DATEDIFF(day, t.date_request, e.date_closed)                AS days_to_closed,
        CASE WHEN e.date_closed IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END       AS is_closed

    FROM total t

    LEFT JOIN exito e
        ON e.perdcomp_id    = t.perdcomp_id
       AND e.perdcomp_type  = t.perdcomp_type

)

SELECT *
FROM final

model.save_data.d_previsibility_hazard.name: d_previsibility_hazard
model.save_data.d_previsibility_hazard.description: Dimensão da camada Gold com as taxas de hazard trimestral de recebimento de PER/DCOMPs, segmentadas por categoria, faixa de idade e setor econômico (v10.3). Para cada combinação (cat × faixa × economic_sector) do grid completo, calcula o hazard final via shrinkage hierárquico: combina o hazard setorial puro com o hazard agregado de cat × faixa proporcionalmente ao volume de amostra do setor (hazard_final = (n/(n+30)) × h_setor + (30/(n+30)) × h_geral). Treina nos últimos 4 trimestres fechados com margem de 7 dias de lookback. Combos sem amostra setorial herdam 100% do hazard geral. A partir da v10.3, aplica dois filtros de exclusão: CNPJs sem procuração (silver_external_cnpj_delete_previsibility) e PER/DCOMPs cancelados ou sem procuração (silver_status_perdcomp_delete_previsibility), tanto na base de treinamento (fechadas) quanto na base de abertos (abertos_raw). Consumido pelo modelo Python previsibility_models_v10.py como input principal do alocador hazard-based.

cat.name: cat
cat.description: Categoria do PER/DCOMP. Valores projetáveis: Restituição/Ressarcimento, Compensação, Compensação/Ofício. Indeferimento é excluído do grid.

faixa.name: faixa
faixa.description: Faixa de idade do PER/DCOMP no início do trimestre de treino, em dias corridos desde a data de requisição. Valores: 0-180, 181-365, 366-730, >730.

economic_sector.name: economic_sector
economic_sector.description: Setor econômico do CNPJ titular do PER/DCOMP, obtido via JOIN com d_customers_info. Top 10 setores recebem hazard próprio; demais são agrupados como Outros.

saldo_ativo_setor.name: saldo_ativo_setor
saldo_ativo_setor.description: Soma do saldo dos PER/DCOMPs ativos no início de cada trimestre de treino, para a combinação (cat × faixa × economic_sector), acumulado nos 4 tris.

valor_pago_setor.name: valor_pago_setor
valor_pago_setor.description: Soma do valor efetivamente compensado dentro de cada trimestre de treino, para a combinação (cat × faixa × economic_sector), acumulado nos 4 tris.

n_obs_setor.name: n_obs_setor
n_obs_setor.description: Número de PER/DCOMPs pagos no setor durante o período de treino. Usado como proxy de tamanho de amostra no cálculo do shrinkage_weight.

hazard_setor_raw.name: hazard_setor_raw
hazard_setor_raw.description: Hazard puro do setor: valor_pago_setor / saldo_ativo_setor. Zero quando saldo_ativo_setor = 0. Pode ser ruidoso em setores com pouca amostra — usar hazard_trimestral (pós-shrinkage) para projeções.

hazard_geral_cat_faixa.name: hazard_geral_cat_faixa
hazard_geral_cat_faixa.description: Hazard agregado de cat × faixa sem segmentação setorial, calculado sobre os mesmos 4 trimestres de treino. Serve como ancora do shrinkage e como fallback para combos sem amostra setorial.

shrinkage_weight.name: shrinkage_weight
shrinkage_weight.description: Peso aplicado ao hazard setorial no shrinkage: n_obs_setor / (n_obs_setor + 30). Varia de 0 (sem amostra, usa 100% do hazard geral) a ~1 (amostra grande, usa quase 100% do hazard setorial).

hazard_trimestral.name: hazard_trimestral
hazard_trimestral.description: Hazard final após shrinkage hierárquico, usado pelo motor Python na projeção. Fórmula: (shrinkage_weight × hazard_setor_raw) + ((1 - shrinkage_weight) × hazard_geral_cat_faixa). Quando saldo_ativo_setor = 0, assume diretamente hazard_geral_cat_faixa.

n_tris_base.name: n_tris_base
n_tris_base.description: Número de trimestres fechados utilizados no treinamento do hazard (máximo 4). Combos sem amostra setorial recebem o valor total de tris disponíveis.

transformed_at_gold.name: transformed_at_gold
transformed_at_gold.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Gold foi executada.

model.save_data.d_previsibility_hazard.raw_code:
{{ config(materialized='table') }}

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- HAZARD v11.1 — LOOKBACK POR CATEGORIA
--
-- Mudanças da v11.0 → v11.1:
--   - Lookback parametrizado por categoria:
--       Ressarcimento       → 6 meses  (regime atual diferente dos picos de 2025)
--       Compensação         → 12 meses (estável, volume alto)
--       Restituição         → 12 meses (volume baixo em faixas longas)
--       Compensação/Ofício  → 12 meses (volume pequeno, precisa de máxima história)
--   - Demais mudanças da v11.0 mantidas
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

WITH cnpj_excluidos AS (
    SELECT cnpj FROM {{ ref('silver_external_cnpj_delete_previsibility') }}
),

perdcomps_excluidos AS (
    SELECT perdcomp FROM {{ ref('silver_status_perdcomp_delete_previsibility') }}
),

top_setores AS (
    SELECT 'Café (comércio/torrefação)'        AS economic_sector
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Supermercado/hipermercado'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Comércio De Carnes (açougue)'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Abate E Processamento De Carnes'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Hortifrutigranjeiros/frutas'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Confecção/vestuário'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Distribuidor/atacadista Alimentos'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Postos/combustíveis'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Gás/combustíveis'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Transporte/logística'
),

cnpj_setor_uf AS (
    SELECT
        cnpj,
        CASE
            WHEN economic_sector IN (SELECT economic_sector FROM top_setores)
                THEN economic_sector
            ELSE 'Outros'
        END AS economic_sector,
        uf
    FROM {{ ref('d_customers_info') }}
    WHERE cnpj IS NOT NULL
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- LOOKBACK POR CATEGORIA
-- Ressarcimento: 6 meses — regime atual muito diferente dos picos de 2025
-- Demais: 12 meses — volume menor ou comportamento estável
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
meses_disponiveis AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        EOMONTH(date_compensation)                                          AS fim_mes,
        DATEFROMPARTS(
            YEAR(EOMONTH(date_compensation)),
            MONTH(EOMONTH(date_compensation)),
            1
        )                                                                   AS inicio_mes
    FROM {{ ref('f_excel_tax_recovery') }}
    WHERE date_compensation IS NOT NULL
      AND EOMONTH(date_compensation) <= DATEADD(DAY, -7, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
),

ultimos_6_meses AS (
    SELECT TOP 6 fim_mes, inicio_mes
    FROM meses_disponiveis
    ORDER BY fim_mes DESC
),

ultimos_12_meses AS (
    SELECT TOP 12 fim_mes, inicio_mes
    FROM meses_disponiveis
    ORDER BY fim_mes DESC
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- PAINEL: fechadas + abertas com cat separada
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
fechadas AS (
    SELECT
        a.perdcomp_id,
        b.cnpj,
        CASE
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%compensação de ofício%' THEN 'Compensação/Ofício'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%compensação%'           THEN 'Compensação'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%indeferimento%'         THEN 'Indeferimento'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%ressarcimento%'     THEN 'Ressarcimento'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%restitu%'           THEN 'Restituição'
            ELSE a.perdcomp_type
        END                                         AS cat,
        a.date_request                              AS data_requisicao,
        a.date_compensation                         AS data_compensacao,
        a.amount_compensated                        AS valor,
        CAST(1 AS TINYINT)                          AS event_flag
    FROM {{ ref('f_excel_tax_recovery') }} a
    LEFT JOIN {{ ref('silver_excel_control_pers') }} b
        ON b.perdcomp_number = a.perdcomp_id OR b.perdcomp_number = a.perdcomp_number
    WHERE (b.amount_balance < 20 OR b.amount_balance IS NULL)
      AND a.perdcomp_id NOT IN ('', '0')
      AND a.date_compensation IS NOT NULL
      AND DATEDIFF(DAY, a.date_request, a.date_compensation) > 0
      AND b.cnpj NOT IN (SELECT cnpj FROM cnpj_excluidos)
      AND REPLACE(REPLACE(a.perdcomp_id, '.', ''), '-', '')
            NOT IN (SELECT perdcomp FROM perdcomps_excluidos)
),

abertos_raw AS (
    SELECT
        perdcomp_number,
        MAX(cnpj)                           AS cnpj,
        MIN(date_request)                   AS data_requisicao,
        SUM(amount_balance)                 AS valor,
        SUM(amount_compensated)             AS amount_compensated,
        SUM(amount_office_compensation)     AS amount_office_compensation,
        SUM(amount_restituted_reimbursed)   AS amount_restituted_reimbursed,
        SUM(amount_denial)                  AS amount_denial
    FROM {{ ref('silver_excel_control_pers') }}
    WHERE amount_balance >= 20
      AND cnpj NOT IN (SELECT cnpj FROM cnpj_excluidos)
      AND REPLACE(REPLACE(perdcomp_number, '.', ''), '-', '')
            NOT IN (SELECT perdcomp FROM perdcomps_excluidos)
    GROUP BY perdcomp_number
),

abertos_type_raw AS (
    SELECT
        perdcomp_number,
        MAX(perdcomp_type_raw) AS perdcomp_type_raw
    FROM {{ ref('f_excel_tax_recovery') }}
    WHERE perdcomp_type_raw IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY perdcomp_number
),

list_dcomps AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT reference_pers FROM {{ ref('silver_excel_control_dcomps') }}
),

abertas AS (
    SELECT
        a.perdcomp_number                   AS perdcomp_id,
        a.cnpj,
        CASE
            WHEN b.reference_pers IS NOT NULL
              OR NULLIF(a.amount_compensated, 0) IS NOT NULL         THEN 'Compensação'
            WHEN NULLIF(a.amount_office_compensation, 0) IS NOT NULL THEN 'Compensação/Ofício'
            WHEN NULLIF(a.amount_denial, 0) IS NOT NULL              THEN 'Indeferimento'
            WHEN LOWER(atr.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%ressarcimento%' THEN 'Ressarcimento'
            WHEN LOWER(atr.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%restitu%'       THEN 'Restituição'
            WHEN NULLIF(a.amount_restituted_reimbursed, 0) IS NOT NULL THEN 'Restituição'
            ELSE 'Restituição'
        END                                 AS cat,
        a.data_requisicao,
        CAST(NULL AS DATE)                  AS data_compensacao,
        a.valor,
        CAST(0 AS TINYINT)                  AS event_flag
    FROM abertos_raw a
    LEFT JOIN list_dcomps b         ON b.reference_pers = a.perdcomp_number
    LEFT JOIN abertos_type_raw atr  ON atr.perdcomp_number = a.perdcomp_number
),

painel_raw AS (
    SELECT * FROM fechadas
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM abertas
),

painel AS (
    SELECT
        p.perdcomp_id,
        COALESCE(s.economic_sector, 'Outros')   AS economic_sector,
        s.uf,
        p.cat,
        p.data_requisicao,
        p.data_compensacao,
        p.valor,
        p.event_flag
    FROM painel_raw p
    LEFT JOIN cnpj_setor_uf s ON s.cnpj = p.cnpj
),

painel_projetavel AS (
    SELECT * FROM painel
    WHERE cat IN ('Restituição', 'Ressarcimento', 'Compensação', 'Compensação/Ofício')
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- CRUZA PAINEL COM MESES — lookback diferente por categoria
-- Ressarcimento → ultimos_6_meses
-- Demais        → ultimos_12_meses
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
painel_x_mes AS (
    -- Ressarcimento: 6 meses -> mudei para 12 meses novamente!!!!
    SELECT
        p.cat, p.economic_sector, p.uf, p.valor,
        m.inicio_mes, m.fim_mes,
        CASE
            WHEN p.data_requisicao < m.inicio_mes
             AND (p.event_flag = 0 OR p.data_compensacao >= m.inicio_mes)
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS ativa_no_inicio,
        CASE
            WHEN p.event_flag = 1
             AND p.data_compensacao >= m.inicio_mes
             AND p.data_compensacao <= m.fim_mes
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS paga_no_mes,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, p.data_requisicao, m.inicio_mes) AS idade_inicio_mes
    FROM painel_projetavel p
    CROSS JOIN ultimos_12_meses m
    WHERE p.cat = 'Ressarcimento'
      AND p.data_requisicao < m.inicio_mes

    UNION ALL

    -- Demais categorias: 12 meses
    SELECT
        p.cat, p.economic_sector, p.uf, p.valor,
        m.inicio_mes, m.fim_mes,
        CASE
            WHEN p.data_requisicao < m.inicio_mes
             AND (p.event_flag = 0 OR p.data_compensacao >= m.inicio_mes)
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS ativa_no_inicio,
        CASE
            WHEN p.event_flag = 1
             AND p.data_compensacao >= m.inicio_mes
             AND p.data_compensacao <= m.fim_mes
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS paga_no_mes,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, p.data_requisicao, m.inicio_mes) AS idade_inicio_mes
    FROM painel_projetavel p
    CROSS JOIN ultimos_12_meses m
    WHERE p.cat <> 'Ressarcimento'
      AND p.data_requisicao < m.inicio_mes
),

painel_faixado AS (
    SELECT
        inicio_mes, fim_mes, cat, economic_sector, uf, valor,
        ativa_no_inicio, paga_no_mes,
        CASE
            WHEN idade_inicio_mes <=  90 THEN '0-90'
            WHEN idade_inicio_mes <= 180 THEN '91-180'
            WHEN idade_inicio_mes <= 365 THEN '181-365'
            WHEN idade_inicio_mes <= 730 THEN '366-730'
            ELSE '>730'
        END AS faixa
    FROM painel_x_mes
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- HAZARD SETORIAL: cat × faixa × setor × UF
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
hazard_setor_uf AS (
    SELECT
        cat, faixa, economic_sector, uf,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ativa_no_inicio = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END) AS saldo_ativo,
        SUM(CASE WHEN paga_no_mes     = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END) AS valor_pago,
        SUM(CASE WHEN paga_no_mes     = 1 THEN 1     ELSE 0 END) AS n_obs,
        COUNT(DISTINCT fim_mes)                                   AS n_meses_base
    FROM painel_faixado
    GROUP BY cat, faixa, economic_sector, uf
),

hazard_setor AS (
    SELECT
        cat, faixa, economic_sector,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ativa_no_inicio = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END) AS saldo_ativo,
        SUM(CASE WHEN paga_no_mes     = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END) AS valor_pago,
        SUM(CASE WHEN paga_no_mes     = 1 THEN 1     ELSE 0 END) AS n_obs
    FROM painel_faixado
    GROUP BY cat, faixa, economic_sector
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- HAZARD GERAL: cat × faixa (denominador do shrinkage)
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
hazard_geral AS (
    SELECT
        cat, faixa,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ativa_no_inicio = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END) AS saldo_ativo_geral,
        SUM(CASE WHEN paga_no_mes     = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END) AS valor_pago_geral,
        CASE
            WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN ativa_no_inicio = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END) > 0
            THEN SUM(CASE WHEN paga_no_mes = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END)
               / SUM(CASE WHEN ativa_no_inicio = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END)
            ELSE 0
        END AS hazard_geral_cat_faixa
    FROM painel_faixado
    GROUP BY cat, faixa
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- GRID COMPLETO: cat × faixa × setor × UF
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
ufs_presentes AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT uf FROM cnpj_setor_uf WHERE uf IS NOT NULL
),

grid_full AS (
    SELECT c.cat, f.faixa, s.economic_sector, u.uf
    FROM (
                  SELECT 'Restituição'      AS cat
        UNION ALL SELECT 'Ressarcimento'
        UNION ALL SELECT 'Compensação'
        UNION ALL SELECT 'Compensação/Ofício'
    ) c
    CROSS JOIN (
                  SELECT '0-90'     AS faixa
        UNION ALL SELECT '91-180'
        UNION ALL SELECT '181-365'
        UNION ALL SELECT '366-730'
        UNION ALL SELECT '>730'
    ) f
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT economic_sector FROM top_setores
        UNION ALL SELECT 'Outros'
    ) s
    CROSS JOIN ufs_presentes u
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- HAZARD FINAL com SHRINKAGE HIERÁRQUICO
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
hazard_final AS (
    SELECT
        g.cat,
        g.faixa,
        g.economic_sector,
        g.uf,

        COALESCE(hsu.saldo_ativo, 0)    AS saldo_ativo_setor,
        COALESCE(hsu.valor_pago, 0)     AS valor_pago_setor,
        COALESCE(hsu.n_obs, 0)          AS n_obs_setor,
        COALESCE(hsu.n_meses_base, 0)   AS n_meses_base,

        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(hsu.saldo_ativo, 0) > 0
            THEN hsu.valor_pago / hsu.saldo_ativo
            ELSE 0
        END AS hazard_setor_raw,

        COALESCE(hg.hazard_geral_cat_faixa, 0) AS hazard_geral_cat_faixa,

        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(hsu.n_obs, 0) + 30 > 0
            THEN CAST(COALESCE(hsu.n_obs, 0) AS FLOAT) / (COALESCE(hsu.n_obs, 0) + 30)
            ELSE 0
        END AS shrinkage_weight,

        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(hsu.saldo_ativo, 0) > 0
            THEN
                (CAST(COALESCE(hsu.n_obs, 0) AS FLOAT) / (COALESCE(hsu.n_obs, 0) + 30))
                * (hsu.valor_pago / hsu.saldo_ativo)
                +
                (30.0 / (COALESCE(hsu.n_obs, 0) + 30))
                * COALESCE(hg.hazard_geral_cat_faixa, 0)
            ELSE COALESCE(hg.hazard_geral_cat_faixa, 0)
        END AS hazard_mensal

    FROM grid_full g
    LEFT JOIN hazard_setor_uf hsu
        ON  hsu.cat             = g.cat
        AND hsu.faixa           = g.faixa
        AND hsu.economic_sector = g.economic_sector
        AND hsu.uf              = g.uf
    LEFT JOIN hazard_geral hg
        ON  hg.cat   = g.cat
        AND hg.faixa = g.faixa
)

SELECT
    cat,
    faixa,
    economic_sector,
    uf,
    ROUND(saldo_ativo_setor, 2)                 AS saldo_ativo_setor,
    ROUND(valor_pago_setor, 2)                  AS valor_pago_setor,
    n_obs_setor,
    n_meses_base,
    ROUND(hazard_setor_raw, 6)                  AS hazard_setor_raw,
    ROUND(hazard_geral_cat_faixa, 6)            AS hazard_geral_cat_faixa,
    ROUND(shrinkage_weight, 4)                  AS shrinkage_weight,
    ROUND(hazard_mensal, 6)                     AS hazard_mensal,
    dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)        AS transformed_at_gold

FROM hazard_final
model.save_data.d_previsibility_hazard.compiled_code:
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- HAZARD v11.1 — LOOKBACK POR CATEGORIA
--
-- Mudanças da v11.0 → v11.1:
--   - Lookback parametrizado por categoria:
--       Ressarcimento       → 6 meses  (regime atual diferente dos picos de 2025)
--       Compensação         → 12 meses (estável, volume alto)
--       Restituição         → 12 meses (volume baixo em faixas longas)
--       Compensação/Ofício  → 12 meses (volume pequeno, precisa de máxima história)
--   - Demais mudanças da v11.0 mantidas
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

WITH cnpj_excluidos AS (
    SELECT cnpj FROM "save_database"."silver"."silver_external_cnpj_delete_previsibility"
),

perdcomps_excluidos AS (
    SELECT perdcomp FROM "save_database"."silver"."silver_status_perdcomp_delete_previsibility"
),

top_setores AS (
    SELECT 'Café (comércio/torrefação)'        AS economic_sector
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Supermercado/hipermercado'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Comércio De Carnes (açougue)'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Abate E Processamento De Carnes'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Hortifrutigranjeiros/frutas'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Confecção/vestuário'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Distribuidor/atacadista Alimentos'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Postos/combustíveis'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Gás/combustíveis'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Transporte/logística'
),

cnpj_setor_uf AS (
    SELECT
        cnpj,
        CASE
            WHEN economic_sector IN (SELECT economic_sector FROM top_setores)
                THEN economic_sector
            ELSE 'Outros'
        END AS economic_sector,
        uf
    FROM "save_database"."general"."d_customers_info"
    WHERE cnpj IS NOT NULL
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- LOOKBACK POR CATEGORIA
-- Ressarcimento: 6 meses — regime atual muito diferente dos picos de 2025
-- Demais: 12 meses — volume menor ou comportamento estável
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
meses_disponiveis AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        EOMONTH(date_compensation)                                          AS fim_mes,
        DATEFROMPARTS(
            YEAR(EOMONTH(date_compensation)),
            MONTH(EOMONTH(date_compensation)),
            1
        )                                                                   AS inicio_mes
    FROM "save_database"."operation"."f_excel_tax_recovery"
    WHERE date_compensation IS NOT NULL
      AND EOMONTH(date_compensation) <= DATEADD(DAY, -7, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
),

ultimos_6_meses AS (
    SELECT TOP 6 fim_mes, inicio_mes
    FROM meses_disponiveis
    ORDER BY fim_mes DESC
),

ultimos_12_meses AS (
    SELECT TOP 12 fim_mes, inicio_mes
    FROM meses_disponiveis
    ORDER BY fim_mes DESC
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- PAINEL: fechadas + abertas com cat separada
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
fechadas AS (
    SELECT
        a.perdcomp_id,
        b.cnpj,
        CASE
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%compensação de ofício%' THEN 'Compensação/Ofício'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%compensação%'           THEN 'Compensação'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%indeferimento%'         THEN 'Indeferimento'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%ressarcimento%'     THEN 'Ressarcimento'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%restitu%'           THEN 'Restituição'
            ELSE a.perdcomp_type
        END                                         AS cat,
        a.date_request                              AS data_requisicao,
        a.date_compensation                         AS data_compensacao,
        a.amount_compensated                        AS valor,
        CAST(1 AS TINYINT)                          AS event_flag
    FROM "save_database"."operation"."f_excel_tax_recovery" a
    LEFT JOIN "save_database"."silver"."silver_excel_control_pers" b
        ON b.perdcomp_number = a.perdcomp_id OR b.perdcomp_number = a.perdcomp_number
    WHERE (b.amount_balance < 20 OR b.amount_balance IS NULL)
      AND a.perdcomp_id NOT IN ('', '0')
      AND a.date_compensation IS NOT NULL
      AND DATEDIFF(DAY, a.date_request, a.date_compensation) > 0
      AND b.cnpj NOT IN (SELECT cnpj FROM cnpj_excluidos)
      AND REPLACE(REPLACE(a.perdcomp_id, '.', ''), '-', '')
            NOT IN (SELECT perdcomp FROM perdcomps_excluidos)
),

abertos_raw AS (
    SELECT
        perdcomp_number,
        MAX(cnpj)                           AS cnpj,
        MIN(date_request)                   AS data_requisicao,
        SUM(amount_balance)                 AS valor,
        SUM(amount_compensated)             AS amount_compensated,
        SUM(amount_office_compensation)     AS amount_office_compensation,
        SUM(amount_restituted_reimbursed)   AS amount_restituted_reimbursed,
        SUM(amount_denial)                  AS amount_denial
    FROM "save_database"."silver"."silver_excel_control_pers"
    WHERE amount_balance >= 20
      AND cnpj NOT IN (SELECT cnpj FROM cnpj_excluidos)
      AND REPLACE(REPLACE(perdcomp_number, '.', ''), '-', '')
            NOT IN (SELECT perdcomp FROM perdcomps_excluidos)
    GROUP BY perdcomp_number
),

abertos_type_raw AS (
    SELECT
        perdcomp_number,
        MAX(perdcomp_type_raw) AS perdcomp_type_raw
    FROM "save_database"."operation"."f_excel_tax_recovery"
    WHERE perdcomp_type_raw IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY perdcomp_number
),

list_dcomps AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT reference_pers FROM "save_database"."silver"."silver_excel_control_dcomps"
),

abertas AS (
    SELECT
        a.perdcomp_number                   AS perdcomp_id,
        a.cnpj,
        CASE
            WHEN b.reference_pers IS NOT NULL
              OR NULLIF(a.amount_compensated, 0) IS NOT NULL         THEN 'Compensação'
            WHEN NULLIF(a.amount_office_compensation, 0) IS NOT NULL THEN 'Compensação/Ofício'
            WHEN NULLIF(a.amount_denial, 0) IS NOT NULL              THEN 'Indeferimento'
            WHEN LOWER(atr.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%ressarcimento%' THEN 'Ressarcimento'
            WHEN LOWER(atr.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%restitu%'       THEN 'Restituição'
            WHEN NULLIF(a.amount_restituted_reimbursed, 0) IS NOT NULL THEN 'Restituição'
            ELSE 'Restituição'
        END                                 AS cat,
        a.data_requisicao,
        CAST(NULL AS DATE)                  AS data_compensacao,
        a.valor,
        CAST(0 AS TINYINT)                  AS event_flag
    FROM abertos_raw a
    LEFT JOIN list_dcomps b         ON b.reference_pers = a.perdcomp_number
    LEFT JOIN abertos_type_raw atr  ON atr.perdcomp_number = a.perdcomp_number
),

painel_raw AS (
    SELECT * FROM fechadas
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM abertas
),

painel AS (
    SELECT
        p.perdcomp_id,
        COALESCE(s.economic_sector, 'Outros')   AS economic_sector,
        s.uf,
        p.cat,
        p.data_requisicao,
        p.data_compensacao,
        p.valor,
        p.event_flag
    FROM painel_raw p
    LEFT JOIN cnpj_setor_uf s ON s.cnpj = p.cnpj
),

painel_projetavel AS (
    SELECT * FROM painel
    WHERE cat IN ('Restituição', 'Ressarcimento', 'Compensação', 'Compensação/Ofício')
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- CRUZA PAINEL COM MESES — lookback diferente por categoria
-- Ressarcimento → ultimos_6_meses
-- Demais        → ultimos_12_meses
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
painel_x_mes AS (
    -- Ressarcimento: 6 meses -> mudei para 12 meses novamente!!!!
    SELECT
        p.cat, p.economic_sector, p.uf, p.valor,
        m.inicio_mes, m.fim_mes,
        CASE
            WHEN p.data_requisicao < m.inicio_mes
             AND (p.event_flag = 0 OR p.data_compensacao >= m.inicio_mes)
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS ativa_no_inicio,
        CASE
            WHEN p.event_flag = 1
             AND p.data_compensacao >= m.inicio_mes
             AND p.data_compensacao <= m.fim_mes
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS paga_no_mes,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, p.data_requisicao, m.inicio_mes) AS idade_inicio_mes
    FROM painel_projetavel p
    CROSS JOIN ultimos_12_meses m
    WHERE p.cat = 'Ressarcimento'
      AND p.data_requisicao < m.inicio_mes

    UNION ALL

    -- Demais categorias: 12 meses
    SELECT
        p.cat, p.economic_sector, p.uf, p.valor,
        m.inicio_mes, m.fim_mes,
        CASE
            WHEN p.data_requisicao < m.inicio_mes
             AND (p.event_flag = 0 OR p.data_compensacao >= m.inicio_mes)
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS ativa_no_inicio,
        CASE
            WHEN p.event_flag = 1
             AND p.data_compensacao >= m.inicio_mes
             AND p.data_compensacao <= m.fim_mes
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS paga_no_mes,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, p.data_requisicao, m.inicio_mes) AS idade_inicio_mes
    FROM painel_projetavel p
    CROSS JOIN ultimos_12_meses m
    WHERE p.cat <> 'Ressarcimento'
      AND p.data_requisicao < m.inicio_mes
),

painel_faixado AS (
    SELECT
        inicio_mes, fim_mes, cat, economic_sector, uf, valor,
        ativa_no_inicio, paga_no_mes,
        CASE
            WHEN idade_inicio_mes <=  90 THEN '0-90'
            WHEN idade_inicio_mes <= 180 THEN '91-180'
            WHEN idade_inicio_mes <= 365 THEN '181-365'
            WHEN idade_inicio_mes <= 730 THEN '366-730'
            ELSE '>730'
        END AS faixa
    FROM painel_x_mes
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- HAZARD SETORIAL: cat × faixa × setor × UF
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
hazard_setor_uf AS (
    SELECT
        cat, faixa, economic_sector, uf,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ativa_no_inicio = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END) AS saldo_ativo,
        SUM(CASE WHEN paga_no_mes     = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END) AS valor_pago,
        SUM(CASE WHEN paga_no_mes     = 1 THEN 1     ELSE 0 END) AS n_obs,
        COUNT(DISTINCT fim_mes)                                   AS n_meses_base
    FROM painel_faixado
    GROUP BY cat, faixa, economic_sector, uf
),

hazard_setor AS (
    SELECT
        cat, faixa, economic_sector,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ativa_no_inicio = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END) AS saldo_ativo,
        SUM(CASE WHEN paga_no_mes     = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END) AS valor_pago,
        SUM(CASE WHEN paga_no_mes     = 1 THEN 1     ELSE 0 END) AS n_obs
    FROM painel_faixado
    GROUP BY cat, faixa, economic_sector
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- HAZARD GERAL: cat × faixa (denominador do shrinkage)
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
hazard_geral AS (
    SELECT
        cat, faixa,
        SUM(CASE WHEN ativa_no_inicio = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END) AS saldo_ativo_geral,
        SUM(CASE WHEN paga_no_mes     = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END) AS valor_pago_geral,
        CASE
            WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN ativa_no_inicio = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END) > 0
            THEN SUM(CASE WHEN paga_no_mes = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END)
               / SUM(CASE WHEN ativa_no_inicio = 1 THEN valor ELSE 0 END)
            ELSE 0
        END AS hazard_geral_cat_faixa
    FROM painel_faixado
    GROUP BY cat, faixa
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- GRID COMPLETO: cat × faixa × setor × UF
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
ufs_presentes AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT uf FROM cnpj_setor_uf WHERE uf IS NOT NULL
),

grid_full AS (
    SELECT c.cat, f.faixa, s.economic_sector, u.uf
    FROM (
                  SELECT 'Restituição'      AS cat
        UNION ALL SELECT 'Ressarcimento'
        UNION ALL SELECT 'Compensação'
        UNION ALL SELECT 'Compensação/Ofício'
    ) c
    CROSS JOIN (
                  SELECT '0-90'     AS faixa
        UNION ALL SELECT '91-180'
        UNION ALL SELECT '181-365'
        UNION ALL SELECT '366-730'
        UNION ALL SELECT '>730'
    ) f
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT economic_sector FROM top_setores
        UNION ALL SELECT 'Outros'
    ) s
    CROSS JOIN ufs_presentes u
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- HAZARD FINAL com SHRINKAGE HIERÁRQUICO
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
hazard_final AS (
    SELECT
        g.cat,
        g.faixa,
        g.economic_sector,
        g.uf,

        COALESCE(hsu.saldo_ativo, 0)    AS saldo_ativo_setor,
        COALESCE(hsu.valor_pago, 0)     AS valor_pago_setor,
        COALESCE(hsu.n_obs, 0)          AS n_obs_setor,
        COALESCE(hsu.n_meses_base, 0)   AS n_meses_base,

        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(hsu.saldo_ativo, 0) > 0
            THEN hsu.valor_pago / hsu.saldo_ativo
            ELSE 0
        END AS hazard_setor_raw,

        COALESCE(hg.hazard_geral_cat_faixa, 0) AS hazard_geral_cat_faixa,

        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(hsu.n_obs, 0) + 30 > 0
            THEN CAST(COALESCE(hsu.n_obs, 0) AS FLOAT) / (COALESCE(hsu.n_obs, 0) + 30)
            ELSE 0
        END AS shrinkage_weight,

        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(hsu.saldo_ativo, 0) > 0
            THEN
                (CAST(COALESCE(hsu.n_obs, 0) AS FLOAT) / (COALESCE(hsu.n_obs, 0) + 30))
                * (hsu.valor_pago / hsu.saldo_ativo)
                +
                (30.0 / (COALESCE(hsu.n_obs, 0) + 30))
                * COALESCE(hg.hazard_geral_cat_faixa, 0)
            ELSE COALESCE(hg.hazard_geral_cat_faixa, 0)
        END AS hazard_mensal

    FROM grid_full g
    LEFT JOIN hazard_setor_uf hsu
        ON  hsu.cat             = g.cat
        AND hsu.faixa           = g.faixa
        AND hsu.economic_sector = g.economic_sector
        AND hsu.uf              = g.uf
    LEFT JOIN hazard_geral hg
        ON  hg.cat   = g.cat
        AND hg.faixa = g.faixa
)

SELECT
    cat,
    faixa,
    economic_sector,
    uf,
    ROUND(saldo_ativo_setor, 2)                 AS saldo_ativo_setor,
    ROUND(valor_pago_setor, 2)                  AS valor_pago_setor,
    n_obs_setor,
    n_meses_base,
    ROUND(hazard_setor_raw, 6)                  AS hazard_setor_raw,
    ROUND(hazard_geral_cat_faixa, 6)            AS hazard_geral_cat_faixa,
    ROUND(shrinkage_weight, 4)                  AS shrinkage_weight,
    ROUND(hazard_mensal, 6)                     AS hazard_mensal,
    dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)        AS transformed_at_gold

FROM hazard_final

model.save_data.f_previsibility_baseline.name: f_previsibility_baseline_v10
model.save_data.f_previsibility_baseline.description: Fato da camada Gold com o baseline de previsibilidade de recebíveis tributários por PER/DCOMP aberto (v10.3). Para cada pedido em aberto (com saldo positivo), aplica um DNA de prazo com fallback hierárquico em três níveis (DNA por grupo+cat+setor → grupo+cat → cat → hardcoded) para estimar as datas teóricas de recebimento nos cenários P25, P50 e P75. Inclui a coluna economic_sector obtida via JOIN com d_customers_info. A partir da v10.3, aplica dois filtros de exclusão: CNPJs sem procuração (silver_external_cnpj_delete_previsibility) e PER/DCOMPs cancelados ou sem procuração (silver_status_perdcomp_delete_previsibility). O filtro de categorias projetáveis (exclusão de Indeferimento) é aplicado no Python, não aqui.

perdcomp_id.name: perdcomp_id
perdcomp_id.description: Número do PER/DCOMP aberto, identificador do pedido na Receita Federal.

cnpj.name: cnpj
cnpj.description: CNPJ da empresa titular do PER/DCOMP, sem formatação (14 dígitos).

company_name.name: company_name
company_name.description: Razão social da empresa titular do PER/DCOMP.

grupo.name: grupo
grupo.description: Classificação do tributo do PER/DCOMP. Valores: Cofins, Pis/Pasep, Inss, Ipi, Irpj, Csll ou o valor original quando não mapeado.

cat.name: cat
cat.description: Categoria do PER/DCOMP com base no tipo do pedido. Valores: Compensação, Compensação/Ofício, Restituição/Ressarcimento, Indeferimento ou o valor original quando não mapeado.

faixa.name: faixa
faixa.description: Faixa de idade do PER/DCOMP com base nos dias corridos desde a data de requisição até hoje. Coluna primária do motor de projeção v10. Valores: 0-180, 181-365, 366-730, >730.

economic_sector.name: economic_sector
economic_sector.description: Setor econômico do CNPJ titular, obtido via JOIN com d_customers_info (v10.2). Top 10 setores recebem hazard próprio; demais são agrupados como Outros. CNPJs sem mapeamento recebem Outros via COALESCE.

data_requisicao.name: data_requisicao
data_requisicao.description: Data de protocolo (requisição) do PER/DCOMP na Receita Federal.

amount_balance.name: amount_balance
amount_balance.description: Saldo em aberto do PER/DCOMP, em reais.

idade_dias.name: idade_dias
idade_dias.description: Número de dias corridos entre a data de requisição e a data atual.

p25_dias.name: p25_dias
p25_dias.description: Percentil 25 do prazo de compensação em dias, obtido via DNA rolling 12 meses com fallback hierárquico em três níveis: (grupo × cat × setor) → (grupo × cat) → (cat) → hardcoded. Representa o cenário otimista. Mínimo de 30 observações para aplicar cada nível; fallback hardcoded: 90 dias.

p50_dias.name: p50_dias
p50_dias.description: Percentil 50 (mediana) do prazo de compensação em dias, obtido via DNA rolling 12 meses com fallback hierárquico em três níveis: (grupo × cat × setor) → (grupo × cat) → (cat) → hardcoded. Representa o cenário base. Mínimo de 30 observações para aplicar cada nível; fallback hardcoded: 120 dias.

p75_dias.name: p75_dias
p75_dias.description: Percentil 75 do prazo de compensação em dias, obtido via DNA rolling 12 meses com fallback hierárquico em três níveis: (grupo × cat × setor) → (grupo × cat) → (cat) → hardcoded. Representa o cenário pessimista. Mínimo de 30 observações para aplicar cada nível; fallback hardcoded: 180 dias.

data_teo_base.name: data_teo_base
data_teo_base.description: Data teórica de recebimento calculada adicionando p50_dias à data de requisição. Representa a estimativa central (cenário base) de quando o valor será compensado. Usada para calcular status e tri_teorico.

status.name: status
status.description: Indica se o PER/DCOMP está dentro ou fora do prazo teórico baseado no P50. Valores: Atrasado (data_teo_base < hoje), No Prazo.

tri_teorico.name: tri_teorico
tri_teorico.description: Trimestre teórico de recebimento calculado a partir da data_teo_base, no formato ANOQn (ex: 2025Q1). Exibido no Power BI como referência, não dirige o motor de projeção.

transformed_at_gold.name: transformed_at_gold
transformed_at_gold.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Gold foi executada.

model.save_data.f_previsibility_baseline.raw_code:
{{ config(materialized='table') }}

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- BASELINE v11.0
--
-- Mudanças da v10.3 → v11.0:
--   1. Nova dimensão: uf (estado do CNPJ via d_customers_info)
--   2. Separação de cat: Restituição vs Ressarcimento via perdcomp_type_raw
--      - LOWER LIKE '%restitu%' → 'Restituição'
--      - LOWER LIKE '%ressarcimento%' → 'Ressarcimento'
--      - demais: lógica anterior mantida
--   3. Novas faixas nos primeiros 180 dias: 0-90 / 91-180
--      Faixas longas mantidas: 181-365 / 366-730 / >730
--   4. data_teo_mes: data teórica mensal (p50_dias + data_requisicao)
--      Substitui tri_teorico como referência principal de prazo
--   5. status agora baseado em data_teo_mes (< hoje = Atrasado)
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

WITH cnpj_excluidos AS (
    SELECT cnpj FROM {{ ref('silver_external_cnpj_delete_previsibility') }}
),

perdcomps_excluidos AS (
    SELECT perdcomp FROM {{ ref('silver_status_perdcomp_delete_previsibility') }}
),

top_setores AS (
    SELECT 'Café (comércio/torrefação)'        AS economic_sector
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Supermercado/hipermercado'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Comércio De Carnes (açougue)'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Abate E Processamento De Carnes'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Hortifrutigranjeiros/frutas'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Confecção/vestuário'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Distribuidor/atacadista Alimentos'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Postos/combustíveis'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Gás/combustíveis'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Transporte/logística'
),

cnpj_setor_uf AS (
    -- v11: traz setor E uf em uma única CTE
    SELECT
        cnpj,
        CASE
            WHEN economic_sector IN (SELECT economic_sector FROM top_setores)
                THEN economic_sector
            ELSE 'Outros'
        END AS economic_sector,
        uf
    FROM {{ ref('d_customers_info') }}
    WHERE cnpj IS NOT NULL
),

ids_abertos AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT perdcomp_number
    FROM {{ ref('silver_excel_control_pers') }}
    WHERE amount_balance > 0
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- BASE FECHADA para DNA — rolling 12m
-- v11: usa perdcomp_type_raw para separar Restituição e Ressarcimento
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
base_fechada AS (
    SELECT
        a.perdcomp_id,
        b.cnpj,

        CASE
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_tax_type) LIKE '%cofins%'
              OR LOWER(a.perdcomp_tax_type) LIKE '%cofns%'  THEN 'Cofins'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_tax_type) LIKE '%pis%'
              OR LOWER(a.perdcomp_tax_type) LIKE '%pasep%'  THEN 'Pis/Pasep'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_tax_type) LIKE '%inss%'   THEN 'Inss'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_tax_type) LIKE '%ipi%'    THEN 'Ipi'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_tax_type) LIKE '%irpj%'   THEN 'Irpj'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_tax_type) LIKE '%csll%'   THEN 'Csll'
            ELSE a.perdcomp_tax_type
        END AS grupo,

        -- v11: compensação verificada primeiro (perdcomp_type normalizado);
        --      raw só entra para distinguir Restituição vs Ressarcimento
        CASE
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%compensação de ofício%' THEN 'Compensação/Ofício'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%compensação%'           THEN 'Compensação'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%indeferimento%'         THEN 'Indeferimento'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%ressarcimento%'     THEN 'Ressarcimento'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%restitu%'           THEN 'Restituição'
            ELSE a.perdcomp_type
        END AS cat,

        DATEDIFF(DAY, a.date_request, a.date_compensation) AS dias

    FROM {{ ref('f_excel_tax_recovery') }} a
    LEFT JOIN {{ ref('silver_excel_control_pers') }} b
        ON b.perdcomp_number = a.perdcomp_id OR b.perdcomp_number = a.perdcomp_number
    WHERE b.amount_balance <= 0
      AND a.perdcomp_id NOT IN ('', '0')
      AND a.date_compensation IS NOT NULL
      AND DATEDIFF(DAY, a.date_request, a.date_compensation) > 0
      AND a.perdcomp_id NOT IN (SELECT perdcomp_number FROM ids_abertos)
      AND a.date_compensation >= DATEADD(MONTH, -12, GETDATE())
      AND b.cnpj NOT IN (SELECT cnpj FROM cnpj_excluidos)
      AND REPLACE(REPLACE(a.perdcomp_id, '.', ''), '-', '')
            NOT IN (SELECT perdcomp FROM perdcomps_excluidos)
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- DNA: percentis históricos (metadado — exibição no drill)
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
dna_condicional AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        grupo, cat,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias) OVER (PARTITION BY grupo, cat) AS p25,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias) OVER (PARTITION BY grupo, cat) AS p50,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias) OVER (PARTITION BY grupo, cat) AS p75,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY grupo, cat)                                            AS n_obs
    FROM base_fechada
),

dna_cat AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        cat,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias) OVER (PARTITION BY cat) AS p25,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias) OVER (PARTITION BY cat) AS p50,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias) OVER (PARTITION BY cat) AS p75,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY cat)                                            AS n_obs
    FROM base_fechada
),

dna_setor AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        bf.grupo,
        bf.cat,
        COALESCE(cs.economic_sector, 'Outros')                                              AS economic_sector,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY bf.dias)
            OVER (PARTITION BY bf.grupo, bf.cat, COALESCE(cs.economic_sector, 'Outros'))   AS p25,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY bf.dias)
            OVER (PARTITION BY bf.grupo, bf.cat, COALESCE(cs.economic_sector, 'Outros'))   AS p50,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY bf.dias)
            OVER (PARTITION BY bf.grupo, bf.cat, COALESCE(cs.economic_sector, 'Outros'))   AS p75,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY bf.grupo, bf.cat,
                       COALESCE(cs.economic_sector, 'Outros'))                             AS n_obs
    FROM base_fechada bf
    LEFT JOIN cnpj_setor_uf cs ON cs.cnpj = bf.cnpj
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- ABERTAS
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
abertos_raw AS (
    SELECT
        perdcomp_number       AS perdcomp_id,
        cnpj,
        company_name,
        MIN(tax_type)         AS tax_type,
        MAX(type)             AS type,
        MIN(date_request)     AS data_requisicao,
        SUM(amount_balance)   AS amount_balance
    FROM {{ ref('silver_excel_control_pers') }}
    WHERE amount_balance > 0
      AND cnpj NOT IN (SELECT cnpj FROM cnpj_excluidos)
      AND REPLACE(REPLACE(perdcomp_number, '.', ''), '-', '')
            NOT IN (SELECT perdcomp FROM perdcomps_excluidos)
    GROUP BY perdcomp_number, cnpj, company_name
),

list_dcomps AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT reference_pers FROM {{ ref('silver_excel_control_dcomps') }}
),

-- v11: JOIN com f_excel_tax_recovery para obter perdcomp_type_raw nas abertas
abertos_type_raw AS (
    SELECT
        perdcomp_number,
        MAX(perdcomp_type_raw) AS perdcomp_type_raw
    FROM {{ ref('f_excel_tax_recovery') }}
    WHERE perdcomp_type_raw IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY perdcomp_number
),

abertos AS (
    SELECT
        a.perdcomp_id,
        a.cnpj,
        a.company_name,
        a.data_requisicao,
        a.amount_balance,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, a.data_requisicao, GETDATE()) AS idade_dias,

        CASE
            WHEN LOWER(a.tax_type) LIKE '%cofins%'
              OR LOWER(a.tax_type) LIKE '%cofns%'  THEN 'Cofins'
            WHEN LOWER(a.tax_type) LIKE '%pis%'
              OR LOWER(a.tax_type) LIKE '%pasep%'  THEN 'Pis/Pasep'
            WHEN LOWER(a.tax_type) LIKE '%inss%'   THEN 'Inss'
            WHEN LOWER(a.tax_type) LIKE '%ipi%'    THEN 'Ipi'
            WHEN LOWER(a.tax_type) LIKE '%irpj%'   THEN 'Irpj'
            WHEN LOWER(a.tax_type) LIKE '%csll%'   THEN 'Csll'
            ELSE a.tax_type
        END AS grupo,

        -- v11: compensação verificada primeiro (type normalizado);
        --      raw só entra para distinguir Restituição vs Ressarcimento
        CASE
            WHEN b.reference_pers IS NOT NULL                                   THEN 'Compensação'
            WHEN LOWER(a.type) LIKE '%compensação de ofício%'                   THEN 'Compensação/Ofício'
            WHEN LOWER(a.type) LIKE '%compensação%'                             THEN 'Compensação'
            WHEN LOWER(a.type) LIKE '%indeferimento%'                           THEN 'Indeferimento'
