            WHEN LOWER(atr.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%ressarcimento%'            THEN 'Ressarcimento'
            WHEN LOWER(atr.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%restitu%'                  THEN 'Restituição'
            ELSE a.type
        END AS cat,

        -- v11: faixas menores nos primeiros 180 dias
        CASE
            WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.data_requisicao, GETDATE()) <=  90 THEN '0-90'
            WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.data_requisicao, GETDATE()) <= 180 THEN '91-180'
            WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.data_requisicao, GETDATE()) <= 365 THEN '181-365'
            WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.data_requisicao, GETDATE()) <= 730 THEN '366-730'
            ELSE '>730'
        END AS faixa

    FROM abertos_raw a
    LEFT JOIN list_dcomps b         ON b.reference_pers = a.perdcomp_id
    LEFT JOIN abertos_type_raw atr  ON atr.perdcomp_number = a.perdcomp_id
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- p50 resolvido (reutilizado em status e data_teo_mes)
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
abertos_p50 AS (
    SELECT
        ab.*,
        COALESCE(cs.economic_sector, 'Outros') AS economic_sector,
        cs.uf,

        -- DNA hierárquico: (grupo × cat × setor) → (grupo × cat) → (cat) → 120d
        COALESCE(
            CASE WHEN ds.n_obs >= 30 THEN CAST(ds.p25 AS INT) END,
            CASE WHEN dc.n_obs >= 30 THEN CAST(dc.p25 AS INT) END,
            CAST(dt.p25 AS INT),
            90
        ) AS p25_dias,

        COALESCE(
            CASE WHEN ds.n_obs >= 30 THEN CAST(ds.p50 AS INT) END,
            CASE WHEN dc.n_obs >= 30 THEN CAST(dc.p50 AS INT) END,
            CAST(dt.p50 AS INT),
            120
        ) AS p50_dias,

        COALESCE(
            CASE WHEN ds.n_obs >= 30 THEN CAST(ds.p75 AS INT) END,
            CASE WHEN dc.n_obs >= 30 THEN CAST(dc.p75 AS INT) END,
            CAST(dt.p75 AS INT),
            180
        ) AS p75_dias

    FROM abertos ab
    LEFT JOIN cnpj_setor_uf cs
        ON cs.cnpj = ab.cnpj
    LEFT JOIN dna_setor ds
        ON  ds.grupo           = ab.grupo
        AND ds.cat             = ab.cat
        AND ds.economic_sector = COALESCE(cs.economic_sector, 'Outros')
    LEFT JOIN dna_condicional dc
        ON  dc.grupo = ab.grupo AND dc.cat = ab.cat AND dc.n_obs >= 30
    LEFT JOIN dna_cat dt
        ON  dt.cat = ab.cat AND dt.n_obs >= 30
)

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- OUTPUT
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SELECT
    -- identificação
    perdcomp_id,
    cnpj,
    company_name,

    -- atributos de negócio
    grupo,
    cat,
    faixa,
    economic_sector,
    uf,                                                         -- v11: novo
    data_requisicao,
    amount_balance,
    idade_dias,

    -- DNA
    p25_dias,
    p50_dias,
    p75_dias,

    -- data teórica mensal (v11: substitui tri_teorico como referência primária)
    DATEADD(DAY, p50_dias, data_requisicao)                     AS data_teo_mes,

    -- status baseado em data_teo_mes
    CASE
        WHEN DATEADD(DAY, p50_dias, data_requisicao) < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
        THEN 'Atrasado'
        ELSE 'No Prazo'
    END AS status,

    -- tri_teorico mantido como metadado de exibição
    CONCAT(
        YEAR(DATEADD(DAY, p50_dias, data_requisicao)),
        'Q',
        DATEPART(QUARTER, DATEADD(DAY, p50_dias, data_requisicao))
    ) AS tri_teorico,

    dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp) AS transformed_at_gold

FROM abertos_p50
model.save_data.f_previsibility_baseline.compiled_code:
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- BASELINE v11.0
--
-- Mudanças da v10.3 → v11.0:
--   1. Nova dimensão: uf (estado do CNPJ via d_customers_info)
--   2. Separação de cat: Restituição vs Ressarcimento via perdcomp_type_raw
--      - LOWER LIKE '%restitu%' → 'Restituição'
--      - LOWER LIKE '%ressarcimento%' → 'Ressarcimento'
--      - demais: lógica anterior mantida
--   3. Novas faixas nos primeiros 180 dias: 0-90 / 91-180
--      Faixas longas mantidas: 181-365 / 366-730 / >730
--   4. data_teo_mes: data teórica mensal (p50_dias + data_requisicao)
--      Substitui tri_teorico como referência principal de prazo
--   5. status agora baseado em data_teo_mes (< hoje = Atrasado)
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

WITH cnpj_excluidos AS (
    SELECT cnpj FROM "save_database"."silver"."silver_external_cnpj_delete_previsibility"
),

perdcomps_excluidos AS (
    SELECT perdcomp FROM "save_database"."silver"."silver_status_perdcomp_delete_previsibility"
),

top_setores AS (
    SELECT 'Café (comércio/torrefação)'        AS economic_sector
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Supermercado/hipermercado'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Comércio De Carnes (açougue)'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Abate E Processamento De Carnes'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Hortifrutigranjeiros/frutas'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Confecção/vestuário'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Distribuidor/atacadista Alimentos'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Postos/combustíveis'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Gás/combustíveis'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Transporte/logística'
),

cnpj_setor_uf AS (
    -- v11: traz setor E uf em uma única CTE
    SELECT
        cnpj,
        CASE
            WHEN economic_sector IN (SELECT economic_sector FROM top_setores)
                THEN economic_sector
            ELSE 'Outros'
        END AS economic_sector,
        uf
    FROM "save_database"."general"."d_customers_info"
    WHERE cnpj IS NOT NULL
),

ids_abertos AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT perdcomp_number
    FROM "save_database"."silver"."silver_excel_control_pers"
    WHERE amount_balance > 0
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- BASE FECHADA para DNA — rolling 12m
-- v11: usa perdcomp_type_raw para separar Restituição e Ressarcimento
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
base_fechada AS (
    SELECT
        a.perdcomp_id,
        b.cnpj,

        CASE
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_tax_type) LIKE '%cofins%'
              OR LOWER(a.perdcomp_tax_type) LIKE '%cofns%'  THEN 'Cofins'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_tax_type) LIKE '%pis%'
              OR LOWER(a.perdcomp_tax_type) LIKE '%pasep%'  THEN 'Pis/Pasep'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_tax_type) LIKE '%inss%'   THEN 'Inss'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_tax_type) LIKE '%ipi%'    THEN 'Ipi'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_tax_type) LIKE '%irpj%'   THEN 'Irpj'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_tax_type) LIKE '%csll%'   THEN 'Csll'
            ELSE a.perdcomp_tax_type
        END AS grupo,

        -- v11: compensação verificada primeiro (perdcomp_type normalizado);
        --      raw só entra para distinguir Restituição vs Ressarcimento
        CASE
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%compensação de ofício%' THEN 'Compensação/Ofício'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%compensação%'           THEN 'Compensação'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%indeferimento%'         THEN 'Indeferimento'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%ressarcimento%'     THEN 'Ressarcimento'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%restitu%'           THEN 'Restituição'
            ELSE a.perdcomp_type
        END AS cat,

        DATEDIFF(DAY, a.date_request, a.date_compensation) AS dias

    FROM "save_database"."operation"."f_excel_tax_recovery" a
    LEFT JOIN "save_database"."silver"."silver_excel_control_pers" b
        ON b.perdcomp_number = a.perdcomp_id OR b.perdcomp_number = a.perdcomp_number
    WHERE b.amount_balance <= 0
      AND a.perdcomp_id NOT IN ('', '0')
      AND a.date_compensation IS NOT NULL
      AND DATEDIFF(DAY, a.date_request, a.date_compensation) > 0
      AND a.perdcomp_id NOT IN (SELECT perdcomp_number FROM ids_abertos)
      AND a.date_compensation >= DATEADD(MONTH, -12, GETDATE())
      AND b.cnpj NOT IN (SELECT cnpj FROM cnpj_excluidos)
      AND REPLACE(REPLACE(a.perdcomp_id, '.', ''), '-', '')
            NOT IN (SELECT perdcomp FROM perdcomps_excluidos)
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- DNA: percentis históricos (metadado — exibição no drill)
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
dna_condicional AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        grupo, cat,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias) OVER (PARTITION BY grupo, cat) AS p25,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias) OVER (PARTITION BY grupo, cat) AS p50,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias) OVER (PARTITION BY grupo, cat) AS p75,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY grupo, cat)                                            AS n_obs
    FROM base_fechada
),

dna_cat AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        cat,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias) OVER (PARTITION BY cat) AS p25,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias) OVER (PARTITION BY cat) AS p50,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias) OVER (PARTITION BY cat) AS p75,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY cat)                                            AS n_obs
    FROM base_fechada
),

dna_setor AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        bf.grupo,
        bf.cat,
        COALESCE(cs.economic_sector, 'Outros')                                              AS economic_sector,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY bf.dias)
            OVER (PARTITION BY bf.grupo, bf.cat, COALESCE(cs.economic_sector, 'Outros'))   AS p25,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY bf.dias)
            OVER (PARTITION BY bf.grupo, bf.cat, COALESCE(cs.economic_sector, 'Outros'))   AS p50,
        PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY bf.dias)
            OVER (PARTITION BY bf.grupo, bf.cat, COALESCE(cs.economic_sector, 'Outros'))   AS p75,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY bf.grupo, bf.cat,
                       COALESCE(cs.economic_sector, 'Outros'))                             AS n_obs
    FROM base_fechada bf
    LEFT JOIN cnpj_setor_uf cs ON cs.cnpj = bf.cnpj
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- ABERTAS
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
abertos_raw AS (
    SELECT
        perdcomp_number       AS perdcomp_id,
        cnpj,
        company_name,
        MIN(tax_type)         AS tax_type,
        MAX(type)             AS type,
        MIN(date_request)     AS data_requisicao,
        SUM(amount_balance)   AS amount_balance
    FROM "save_database"."silver"."silver_excel_control_pers"
    WHERE amount_balance > 0
      AND cnpj NOT IN (SELECT cnpj FROM cnpj_excluidos)
      AND REPLACE(REPLACE(perdcomp_number, '.', ''), '-', '')
            NOT IN (SELECT perdcomp FROM perdcomps_excluidos)
    GROUP BY perdcomp_number, cnpj, company_name
),

list_dcomps AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT reference_pers FROM "save_database"."silver"."silver_excel_control_dcomps"
),

-- v11: JOIN com f_excel_tax_recovery para obter perdcomp_type_raw nas abertas
abertos_type_raw AS (
    SELECT
        perdcomp_number,
        MAX(perdcomp_type_raw) AS perdcomp_type_raw
    FROM "save_database"."operation"."f_excel_tax_recovery"
    WHERE perdcomp_type_raw IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY perdcomp_number
),

abertos AS (
    SELECT
        a.perdcomp_id,
        a.cnpj,
        a.company_name,
        a.data_requisicao,
        a.amount_balance,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, a.data_requisicao, GETDATE()) AS idade_dias,

        CASE
            WHEN LOWER(a.tax_type) LIKE '%cofins%'
              OR LOWER(a.tax_type) LIKE '%cofns%'  THEN 'Cofins'
            WHEN LOWER(a.tax_type) LIKE '%pis%'
              OR LOWER(a.tax_type) LIKE '%pasep%'  THEN 'Pis/Pasep'
            WHEN LOWER(a.tax_type) LIKE '%inss%'   THEN 'Inss'
            WHEN LOWER(a.tax_type) LIKE '%ipi%'    THEN 'Ipi'
            WHEN LOWER(a.tax_type) LIKE '%irpj%'   THEN 'Irpj'
            WHEN LOWER(a.tax_type) LIKE '%csll%'   THEN 'Csll'
            ELSE a.tax_type
        END AS grupo,

        -- v11: compensação verificada primeiro (type normalizado);
        --      raw só entra para distinguir Restituição vs Ressarcimento
        CASE
            WHEN b.reference_pers IS NOT NULL                                   THEN 'Compensação'
            WHEN LOWER(a.type) LIKE '%compensação de ofício%'                   THEN 'Compensação/Ofício'
            WHEN LOWER(a.type) LIKE '%compensação%'                             THEN 'Compensação'
            WHEN LOWER(a.type) LIKE '%indeferimento%'                           THEN 'Indeferimento'
            WHEN LOWER(atr.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%ressarcimento%'            THEN 'Ressarcimento'
            WHEN LOWER(atr.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%restitu%'                  THEN 'Restituição'
            ELSE a.type
        END AS cat,

        -- v11: faixas menores nos primeiros 180 dias
        CASE
            WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.data_requisicao, GETDATE()) <=  90 THEN '0-90'
            WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.data_requisicao, GETDATE()) <= 180 THEN '91-180'
            WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.data_requisicao, GETDATE()) <= 365 THEN '181-365'
            WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.data_requisicao, GETDATE()) <= 730 THEN '366-730'
            ELSE '>730'
        END AS faixa

    FROM abertos_raw a
    LEFT JOIN list_dcomps b         ON b.reference_pers = a.perdcomp_id
    LEFT JOIN abertos_type_raw atr  ON atr.perdcomp_number = a.perdcomp_id
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- p50 resolvido (reutilizado em status e data_teo_mes)
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
abertos_p50 AS (
    SELECT
        ab.*,
        COALESCE(cs.economic_sector, 'Outros') AS economic_sector,
        cs.uf,

        -- DNA hierárquico: (grupo × cat × setor) → (grupo × cat) → (cat) → 120d
        COALESCE(
            CASE WHEN ds.n_obs >= 30 THEN CAST(ds.p25 AS INT) END,
            CASE WHEN dc.n_obs >= 30 THEN CAST(dc.p25 AS INT) END,
            CAST(dt.p25 AS INT),
            90
        ) AS p25_dias,

        COALESCE(
            CASE WHEN ds.n_obs >= 30 THEN CAST(ds.p50 AS INT) END,
            CASE WHEN dc.n_obs >= 30 THEN CAST(dc.p50 AS INT) END,
            CAST(dt.p50 AS INT),
            120
        ) AS p50_dias,

        COALESCE(
            CASE WHEN ds.n_obs >= 30 THEN CAST(ds.p75 AS INT) END,
            CASE WHEN dc.n_obs >= 30 THEN CAST(dc.p75 AS INT) END,
            CAST(dt.p75 AS INT),
            180
        ) AS p75_dias

    FROM abertos ab
    LEFT JOIN cnpj_setor_uf cs
        ON cs.cnpj = ab.cnpj
    LEFT JOIN dna_setor ds
        ON  ds.grupo           = ab.grupo
        AND ds.cat             = ab.cat
        AND ds.economic_sector = COALESCE(cs.economic_sector, 'Outros')
    LEFT JOIN dna_condicional dc
        ON  dc.grupo = ab.grupo AND dc.cat = ab.cat AND dc.n_obs >= 30
    LEFT JOIN dna_cat dt
        ON  dt.cat = ab.cat AND dt.n_obs >= 30
)

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- OUTPUT
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SELECT
    -- identificação
    perdcomp_id,
    cnpj,
    company_name,

    -- atributos de negócio
    grupo,
    cat,
    faixa,
    economic_sector,
    uf,                                                         -- v11: novo
    data_requisicao,
    amount_balance,
    idade_dias,

    -- DNA
    p25_dias,
    p50_dias,
    p75_dias,

    -- data teórica mensal (v11: substitui tri_teorico como referência primária)
    DATEADD(DAY, p50_dias, data_requisicao)                     AS data_teo_mes,

    -- status baseado em data_teo_mes
    CASE
        WHEN DATEADD(DAY, p50_dias, data_requisicao) < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
        THEN 'Atrasado'
        ELSE 'No Prazo'
    END AS status,

    -- tri_teorico mantido como metadado de exibição
    CONCAT(
        YEAR(DATEADD(DAY, p50_dias, data_requisicao)),
        'Q',
        DATEPART(QUARTER, DATEADD(DAY, p50_dias, data_requisicao))
    ) AS tri_teorico,

    dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp) AS transformed_at_gold

FROM abertos_p50

model.save_data.f_previsibility_survival.name: f_previsibility_survival_synthetic_v10
model.save_data.f_previsibility_survival.description: Fato da camada Gold com probabilidades incondicionais de recebimento por faixa de aging, agregadas por combo (cat × economic_sector × grain_type) (v10.0). Uma linha por combo — estático, não depende da idade individual de cada perdcomp. Pivota os contadores de f_previsibility_survival_v10 nos três limiares de faixa (180, 365, 730 dias) e calcula a distribuição histórica completa de cada combo. Diferença da tabela condicional (f_previsibility_survival_perdcomp_v10): aquela depende de S(idade_dias) de cada perdcomp; esta é estática por combo. Consumida no Power BI via RELATED a partir de drill_perdcomp e baseline, eliminando a necessidade de CALCULATE cruzado e melhorando a performance.

cat.name: cat
cat.description: Categoria do PER/DCOMP. Valores projetáveis: Restituição/Ressarcimento, Compensação, Compensação/Ofício.

economic_sector.name: economic_sector
economic_sector.description: Setor econômico do combo. Para grain_type = 'cat', assume 'TOTAL' (curva agregada). Para grain_type = 'cat_setor', contém o setor específico ou 'Outros'.

grain_type.name: grain_type
grain_type.description: Granularidade da linha. Valores: 'cat' (agregado por categoria, economic_sector = 'TOTAL') ou 'cat_setor' (por categoria × setor).

n_total.name: n_total
n_total.description: Total de PER/DCOMPs fechados no combo dentro da janela de 24 meses da f_previsibility_survival_v10. Denominador de todas as probabilidades.

n_obs_suficiente.name: n_obs_suficiente
n_obs_suficiente.description: Flag binário: 1 quando n_total >= 30 (curva confiável), 0 quando amostra insuficiente. Herdado de f_previsibility_survival_v10.

median_days.name: median_days
median_days.description: Mediana (P50) dos dias até pagamento para o combo, herdada da curva de sobrevivência. Arredondada para inteiro.

p75_days.name: p75_days
p75_days.description: Percentil 75 dos dias até pagamento para o combo, herdado da curva de sobrevivência. Arredondado para inteiro.

mean_days.name: mean_days
mean_days.description: Média aritmética dos dias até pagamento para o combo, herdada da curva de sobrevivência. Arredondada em 1 casa decimal.

prob_0_180.name: prob_0_180
prob_0_180.description: Probabilidade incondicional de fechamento na faixa 0-180 dias: (n_total - n_above_180) / n_total. Arredondada em 4 casas decimais.

prob_181_365.name: prob_181_365
prob_181_365.description: Probabilidade incondicional de fechamento na faixa 181-365 dias: (n_above_180 - n_above_365) / n_total. Arredondada em 4 casas decimais.

prob_366_730.name: prob_366_730
prob_366_730.description: Probabilidade incondicional de fechamento na faixa 366-730 dias: (n_above_365 - n_above_730) / n_total. Arredondada em 4 casas decimais.

prob_tail_730.name: prob_tail_730
prob_tail_730.description: Probabilidade incondicional de fechamento após 730 dias (tail residual): n_above_730 / n_total. As quatro probabilidades de faixa somam 1.0. Arredondada em 4 casas decimais.

faixa_modal.name: faixa_modal
faixa_modal.description: Faixa com a maior contagem histórica absoluta no combo. Valores: 0-180, 181-365, 366-730, >730.

transformed_at_gold.name: transformed_at_gold
transformed_at_gold.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Gold foi executada.

model.save_data.f_previsibility_survival.raw_code:
{{ config(materialized='table') }}

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- SURVIVAL SYNTHETIC v11.0 — Probabilidades Incondicionais por Combo
--
-- Mudanças da v10.1 → v11.0:
--   1. Faixas atualizadas: 0-90 / 91-180 / 181-365 / 366-730 / >730
--   2. Pivô usa t_dias = 90 (novo), 180, 365, 730 como limites de faixa
--   3. Cat separada: Restituição / Ressarcimento
--
-- Probabilidades incondicionais:
--   prob_0_90    = (n_total - n_above_90)  / n_total
--   prob_91_180  = (n_above_90 - n_above_180) / n_total
--   prob_181_365 = (n_above_180 - n_above_365) / n_total
--   prob_366_730 = (n_above_365 - n_above_730) / n_total
--   prob_tail_730 = n_above_730 / n_total
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

WITH

pivot_cat AS (
    SELECT
        cat,
        'TOTAL'     AS economic_sector,
        'cat'       AS grain_type,
        MAX(n_total)                                               AS n_total,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t_dias =  90 THEN n_above_t END)            AS n_above_90,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t_dias = 180 THEN n_above_t END)            AS n_above_180,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t_dias = 365 THEN n_above_t END)            AS n_above_365,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t_dias = 730 THEN n_above_t END)            AS n_above_730,
        MAX(median_days)                                           AS median_days,
        MAX(p75_days)                                              AS p75_days,
        MAX(mean_days)                                             AS mean_days,
        MAX(n_obs_suficiente)                                      AS n_obs_suficiente
    FROM {{ ref('f_previsibility_survival_v10') }}
    WHERE grain_type = 'cat'
    GROUP BY cat
),

pivot_cat_setor AS (
    SELECT
        cat,
        economic_sector,
        'cat_setor' AS grain_type,
        MAX(n_total)                                               AS n_total,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t_dias =  90 THEN n_above_t END)            AS n_above_90,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t_dias = 180 THEN n_above_t END)            AS n_above_180,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t_dias = 365 THEN n_above_t END)            AS n_above_365,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t_dias = 730 THEN n_above_t END)            AS n_above_730,
        MAX(median_days)                                           AS median_days,
        MAX(p75_days)                                              AS p75_days,
        MAX(mean_days)                                             AS mean_days,
        MAX(n_obs_suficiente)                                      AS n_obs_suficiente
    FROM {{ ref('f_previsibility_survival_v10') }}
    WHERE grain_type = 'cat_setor'
    GROUP BY cat, economic_sector
),

base AS (
    SELECT * FROM pivot_cat
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM pivot_cat_setor
)

SELECT
    cat,
    economic_sector,
    grain_type,
    n_total,
    n_obs_suficiente,

    -- contexto histórico
    ROUND(median_days, 0)                                                               AS median_days,
    ROUND(p75_days, 0)                                                                  AS p75_days,
    ROUND(mean_days, 1)                                                                 AS mean_days,

    -- probabilidades incondicionais por faixa — somam 1.0
    ROUND(CAST(n_total - n_above_90  AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(n_total, 0), 4)               AS prob_0_90,
    ROUND(CAST(n_above_90 - n_above_180  AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(n_total, 0), 4)           AS prob_91_180,
    ROUND(CAST(n_above_180 - n_above_365 AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(n_total, 0), 4)           AS prob_181_365,
    ROUND(CAST(n_above_365 - n_above_730 AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(n_total, 0), 4)           AS prob_366_730,
    ROUND(CAST(n_above_730               AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(n_total, 0), 4)           AS prob_tail_730,

    -- faixa modal (maior probabilidade histórica do combo)
    CASE
        WHEN (n_total - n_above_90) >= (n_above_90 - n_above_180)
         AND (n_total - n_above_90) >= (n_above_180 - n_above_365)
         AND (n_total - n_above_90) >= (n_above_365 - n_above_730)
         AND (n_total - n_above_90) >= n_above_730                                     THEN '0-90'
        WHEN (n_above_90 - n_above_180) >= (n_total - n_above_90)
         AND (n_above_90 - n_above_180) >= (n_above_180 - n_above_365)
         AND (n_above_90 - n_above_180) >= (n_above_365 - n_above_730)
         AND (n_above_90 - n_above_180) >= n_above_730                                 THEN '91-180'
        WHEN (n_above_180 - n_above_365) >= (n_total - n_above_90)
         AND (n_above_180 - n_above_365) >= (n_above_90 - n_above_180)
         AND (n_above_180 - n_above_365) >= (n_above_365 - n_above_730)
         AND (n_above_180 - n_above_365) >= n_above_730                                THEN '181-365'
        WHEN (n_above_365 - n_above_730) >= (n_total - n_above_90)
         AND (n_above_365 - n_above_730) >= (n_above_90 - n_above_180)
         AND (n_above_365 - n_above_730) >= (n_above_180 - n_above_365)
         AND (n_above_365 - n_above_730) >= n_above_730                                THEN '366-730'
        ELSE '>730'
    END                                                                                AS faixa_modal,

    dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)                                               AS transformed_at_gold

FROM base
model.save_data.f_previsibility_survival.compiled_code:
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- SURVIVAL SYNTHETIC v11.0 — Probabilidades Incondicionais por Combo
--
-- Mudanças da v10.1 → v11.0:
--   1. Faixas atualizadas: 0-90 / 91-180 / 181-365 / 366-730 / >730
--   2. Pivô usa t_dias = 90 (novo), 180, 365, 730 como limites de faixa
--   3. Cat separada: Restituição / Ressarcimento
--
-- Probabilidades incondicionais:
--   prob_0_90    = (n_total - n_above_90)  / n_total
--   prob_91_180  = (n_above_90 - n_above_180) / n_total
--   prob_181_365 = (n_above_180 - n_above_365) / n_total
--   prob_366_730 = (n_above_365 - n_above_730) / n_total
--   prob_tail_730 = n_above_730 / n_total
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

WITH

pivot_cat AS (
    SELECT
        cat,
        'TOTAL'     AS economic_sector,
        'cat'       AS grain_type,
        MAX(n_total)                                               AS n_total,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t_dias =  90 THEN n_above_t END)            AS n_above_90,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t_dias = 180 THEN n_above_t END)            AS n_above_180,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t_dias = 365 THEN n_above_t END)            AS n_above_365,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t_dias = 730 THEN n_above_t END)            AS n_above_730,
        MAX(median_days)                                           AS median_days,
        MAX(p75_days)                                              AS p75_days,
        MAX(mean_days)                                             AS mean_days,
        MAX(n_obs_suficiente)                                      AS n_obs_suficiente
    FROM "save_database"."previsibility"."f_previsibility_survival_v10"
    WHERE grain_type = 'cat'
    GROUP BY cat
),

pivot_cat_setor AS (
    SELECT
        cat,
        economic_sector,
        'cat_setor' AS grain_type,
        MAX(n_total)                                               AS n_total,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t_dias =  90 THEN n_above_t END)            AS n_above_90,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t_dias = 180 THEN n_above_t END)            AS n_above_180,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t_dias = 365 THEN n_above_t END)            AS n_above_365,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t_dias = 730 THEN n_above_t END)            AS n_above_730,
        MAX(median_days)                                           AS median_days,
        MAX(p75_days)                                              AS p75_days,
        MAX(mean_days)                                             AS mean_days,
        MAX(n_obs_suficiente)                                      AS n_obs_suficiente
    FROM "save_database"."previsibility"."f_previsibility_survival_v10"
    WHERE grain_type = 'cat_setor'
    GROUP BY cat, economic_sector
),

base AS (
    SELECT * FROM pivot_cat
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM pivot_cat_setor
)

SELECT
    cat,
    economic_sector,
    grain_type,
    n_total,
    n_obs_suficiente,

    -- contexto histórico
    ROUND(median_days, 0)                                                               AS median_days,
    ROUND(p75_days, 0)                                                                  AS p75_days,
    ROUND(mean_days, 1)                                                                 AS mean_days,

    -- probabilidades incondicionais por faixa — somam 1.0
    ROUND(CAST(n_total - n_above_90  AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(n_total, 0), 4)               AS prob_0_90,
    ROUND(CAST(n_above_90 - n_above_180  AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(n_total, 0), 4)           AS prob_91_180,
    ROUND(CAST(n_above_180 - n_above_365 AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(n_total, 0), 4)           AS prob_181_365,
    ROUND(CAST(n_above_365 - n_above_730 AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(n_total, 0), 4)           AS prob_366_730,
    ROUND(CAST(n_above_730               AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(n_total, 0), 4)           AS prob_tail_730,

    -- faixa modal (maior probabilidade histórica do combo)
    CASE
        WHEN (n_total - n_above_90) >= (n_above_90 - n_above_180)
         AND (n_total - n_above_90) >= (n_above_180 - n_above_365)
         AND (n_total - n_above_90) >= (n_above_365 - n_above_730)
         AND (n_total - n_above_90) >= n_above_730                                     THEN '0-90'
        WHEN (n_above_90 - n_above_180) >= (n_total - n_above_90)
         AND (n_above_90 - n_above_180) >= (n_above_180 - n_above_365)
         AND (n_above_90 - n_above_180) >= (n_above_365 - n_above_730)
         AND (n_above_90 - n_above_180) >= n_above_730                                 THEN '91-180'
        WHEN (n_above_180 - n_above_365) >= (n_total - n_above_90)
         AND (n_above_180 - n_above_365) >= (n_above_90 - n_above_180)
         AND (n_above_180 - n_above_365) >= (n_above_365 - n_above_730)
         AND (n_above_180 - n_above_365) >= n_above_730                                THEN '181-365'
        WHEN (n_above_365 - n_above_730) >= (n_total - n_above_90)
         AND (n_above_365 - n_above_730) >= (n_above_90 - n_above_180)
         AND (n_above_365 - n_above_730) >= (n_above_180 - n_above_365)
         AND (n_above_365 - n_above_730) >= n_above_730                                THEN '366-730'
        ELSE '>730'
    END                                                                                AS faixa_modal,

    dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)                                               AS transformed_at_gold

FROM base

model.save_data.f_previsibility_survival.name: f_previsibility_survival_v10
model.save_data.f_previsibility_survival.description: Fato da camada Gold com a curva de sobrevivência empírica de PER/DCOMPs (v10.0). Para cada threshold de tempo T (30, 60, 90, 120, 180, 270, 365, 540, 730 dias), calcula a probabilidade S(t) = P(dias_até_pagamento > t) com base nos PER/DCOMPs fechados nos últimos 24 meses (rolling). Granularidade dupla: curva por (cat) como série principal e por (cat × setor) como drill opcional — ambas no mesmo conjunto de linhas, diferenciadas por grain_type. Aplica os mesmos filtros de exclusão do baseline: CNPJs sem procuração (silver_external_cnpj_delete_previsibility) e PER/DCOMPs cancelados ou sem procuração (silver_status_perdcomp_delete_previsibility). Consumida pelo Power BI para exibição de curvas de sobrevivência e análise de distribuição de prazos por categoria e setor.

t_dias.name: t_dias
t_dias.description: Threshold de tempo em dias corridos desde a data de requisição. Valores: 30, 60, 90, 120, 180, 270, 365, 540, 730.

cat.name: cat
cat.description: Categoria do PER/DCOMP. Valores projetáveis: Restituição/Ressarcimento, Compensação, Compensação/Ofício. Indeferimento pode aparecer na base histórica mas é excluído nas projeções pelo modelo Python.

economic_sector.name: economic_sector
economic_sector.description: Setor econômico do CNPJ titular, obtido via JOIN com d_customers_info. Para grain_type = 'cat', assume o valor fixo 'TOTAL' (curva agregada). Para grain_type = 'cat_setor', contém o setor específico ou 'Outros' para CNPJs não mapeados ou fora do top 10 setores.

grain_type.name: grain_type
grain_type.description: Indica a granularidade da linha. Valores: 'cat' (curva por categoria, economic_sector = 'TOTAL') ou 'cat_setor' (curva por categoria × setor). Usado no Power BI para separar as duas séries.

n_total.name: n_total
n_total.description: Total de PER/DCOMPs fechados na combinação (cat) ou (cat × setor) dentro da janela de 24 meses. Denominador do cálculo de S(t).

n_above_t.name: n_above_t
n_above_t.description: Número de PER/DCOMPs fechados com dias_até_pagamento > t_dias. Numerador do cálculo de S(t).

survival_prob.name: survival_prob
survival_prob.description: Probabilidade de sobrevivência S(t) = n_above_t / n_total. Representa a fração de perdcomps que ainda não tinham sido pagos após t_dias dias. Arredondada em 4 casas decimais.

cdf_prob.name: cdf_prob
cdf_prob.description: Função de distribuição acumulada: P(dias <= t) = 1 - survival_prob. Representa a fração de perdcomps já liquidados até t_dias dias. Arredondada em 4 casas decimais.

median_days.name: median_days
median_days.description: Mediana (P50) dos dias até pagamento para a combinação (cat) ou (cat × setor) na janela de 24 meses. Calculada via PERCENTILE_CONT. Arredondada para inteiro.

p75_days.name: p75_days
p75_days.description: Percentil 75 dos dias até pagamento para a combinação (cat) ou (cat × setor) na janela de 24 meses. Calculada via PERCENTILE_CONT. Arredondada para inteiro.

mean_days.name: mean_days
mean_days.description: Média aritmética dos dias até pagamento para a combinação (cat) ou (cat × setor) na janela de 24 meses. Arredondada em 1 casa decimal.

n_obs_suficiente.name: n_obs_suficiente
n_obs_suficiente.description: Flag binário: 1 quando n_total >= 30 (curva confiável para exibição no Power BI), 0 quando amostra insuficiente.

transformed_at_gold.name: transformed_at_gold
transformed_at_gold.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Gold foi executada.

model.save_data.f_previsibility_survival.raw_code:
{{ config(materialized='table') }}

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- SURVIVAL CURVE v11.0
--
-- Mudanças da v10.1 → v11.0:
--   1. Separação de cat: Restituição vs Ressarcimento via perdcomp_type_raw
--   2. Novos thresholds nos primeiros 180 dias: 30, 60, 90 (já existia), 120, 180
--      Thresholds longos mantidos: 270, 365, 540, 730
--   3. Faixas incondicionais atualizadas: 0-90 / 91-180 / 181-365 / 366-730 / >730
--      (pivô agora usa t_dias = 90, 180, 365, 730 como limites de faixa)
--
-- Janela histórica: 24 meses rolling
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

WITH cnpj_excluidos AS (
    SELECT cnpj FROM {{ ref('silver_external_cnpj_delete_previsibility') }}
),

perdcomps_excluidos AS (
    SELECT perdcomp FROM {{ ref('silver_status_perdcomp_delete_previsibility') }}
),

ids_abertos AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT perdcomp_number
    FROM {{ ref('silver_excel_control_pers') }}
    WHERE amount_balance > 0
),

top_setores AS (
    SELECT 'Café (comércio/torrefação)'        AS economic_sector
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Supermercado/hipermercado'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Comércio De Carnes (açougue)'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Abate E Processamento De Carnes'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Hortifrutigranjeiros/frutas'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Confecção/vestuário'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Distribuidor/atacadista Alimentos'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Postos/combustíveis'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Gás/combustíveis'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Transporte/logística'
),

cnpj_setor AS (
    SELECT
        cnpj,
        CASE
            WHEN economic_sector IN (SELECT economic_sector FROM top_setores)
                THEN economic_sector
            ELSE 'Outros'
        END AS economic_sector
    FROM {{ ref('d_customers_info') }}
    WHERE cnpj IS NOT NULL
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- BASE FECHADA rolling 24m — v11: separação Restituição / Ressarcimento
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
base_fechada AS (
    SELECT
        a.perdcomp_id,
        b.cnpj,
        CASE
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%compensação de ofício%' THEN 'Compensação/Ofício'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%compensação%'           THEN 'Compensação'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%indeferimento%'         THEN 'Indeferimento'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%ressarcimento%'     THEN 'Ressarcimento'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%restitu%'           THEN 'Restituição'
            ELSE a.perdcomp_type
        END AS cat,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, a.date_request, a.date_compensation) AS dias
    FROM {{ ref('f_excel_tax_recovery') }} a
    LEFT JOIN {{ ref('silver_excel_control_pers') }} b
        ON b.perdcomp_number = a.perdcomp_id OR b.perdcomp_number = a.perdcomp_number
    WHERE b.amount_balance <= 0
      AND a.perdcomp_id NOT IN ('', '0')
      AND a.date_compensation IS NOT NULL
      AND DATEDIFF(DAY, a.date_request, a.date_compensation) > 0
      AND a.perdcomp_id NOT IN (SELECT perdcomp_number FROM ids_abertos)
      AND a.date_compensation >= DATEADD(MONTH, -24, GETDATE())
      AND b.cnpj NOT IN (SELECT cnpj FROM cnpj_excluidos)
      AND REPLACE(REPLACE(a.perdcomp_id, '.', ''), '-', '')
            NOT IN (SELECT perdcomp FROM perdcomps_excluidos)
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- THRESHOLDS: eixo X da curva
-- v11: inclui 90 como limite da nova faixa 0-90
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
thresholds AS (
    SELECT  30 AS t_dias UNION ALL
    SELECT  60           UNION ALL
    SELECT  90           UNION ALL  -- v11: limite faixa 0-90
    SELECT 120           UNION ALL
    SELECT 180           UNION ALL  -- limite faixa 91-180
    SELECT 270           UNION ALL
    SELECT 365           UNION ALL  -- limite faixa 181-365
    SELECT 540           UNION ALL
    SELECT 730                      -- limite faixa 366-730 / >730
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- CURVA POR CAT
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
survival_cat AS (
    SELECT
        t.t_dias,
        bf.cat,
        'TOTAL'                                                             AS economic_sector,
        COUNT(*)                                                            AS n_total,
        SUM(CASE WHEN bf.dias > t.t_dias THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)               AS n_above_t,
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN bf.dias > t.t_dias THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT)
            / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)                                          AS survival_prob,
        sc.median_days,
        sc.p75_days,
        sc.mean_days
    FROM base_fechada bf
    CROSS JOIN thresholds t
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            cat,
            PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias) OVER (PARTITION BY cat) AS median_days,
            PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias) OVER (PARTITION BY cat) AS p75_days,
            AVG(CAST(dias AS FLOAT)) OVER (PARTITION BY cat)                           AS mean_days
        FROM base_fechada
    ) sc ON sc.cat = bf.cat
    GROUP BY t.t_dias, bf.cat, sc.median_days, sc.p75_days, sc.mean_days
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- CURVA POR (CAT × SETOR)
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
base_com_setor AS (
    SELECT
        bf.cat,
        COALESCE(cs.economic_sector, 'Outros') AS economic_sector,
        bf.dias
    FROM base_fechada bf
    LEFT JOIN cnpj_setor cs ON cs.cnpj = bf.cnpj
),

survival_cat_setor AS (
    SELECT
        t.t_dias,
        bcs.cat,
        bcs.economic_sector,
        COUNT(*)                                                             AS n_total,
        SUM(CASE WHEN bcs.dias > t.t_dias THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)              AS n_above_t,
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN bcs.dias > t.t_dias THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT)
            / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)                                           AS survival_prob,
        sc2.median_days,
        sc2.p75_days,
        sc2.mean_days
    FROM base_com_setor bcs
    CROSS JOIN thresholds t
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            cat,
            economic_sector,
            PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias)
                OVER (PARTITION BY cat, economic_sector)  AS median_days,
            PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias)
                OVER (PARTITION BY cat, economic_sector)  AS p75_days,
            AVG(CAST(dias AS FLOAT))
                OVER (PARTITION BY cat, economic_sector)  AS mean_days
        FROM base_com_setor
    ) sc2 ON sc2.cat = bcs.cat AND sc2.economic_sector = bcs.economic_sector
    GROUP BY t.t_dias, bcs.cat, bcs.economic_sector, sc2.median_days, sc2.p75_days, sc2.mean_days
)

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- OUTPUT: union cat (TOTAL) + cat×setor
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SELECT
    t_dias,
    cat,
    economic_sector,
    'cat'                                         AS grain_type,
    n_total,
    n_above_t,
    ROUND(survival_prob, 4)                       AS survival_prob,
    ROUND(1 - survival_prob, 4)                   AS cdf_prob,
    ROUND(median_days, 0)                         AS median_days,
    ROUND(p75_days, 0)                            AS p75_days,
    ROUND(mean_days, 1)                           AS mean_days,
    CASE WHEN n_total >= 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END     AS n_obs_suficiente,
    dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)          AS transformed_at_gold
FROM survival_cat

UNION ALL

SELECT
    t_dias,
    cat,
    economic_sector,
    'cat_setor'                                   AS grain_type,
    n_total,
    n_above_t,
    ROUND(survival_prob, 4)                       AS survival_prob,
    ROUND(1 - survival_prob, 4)                   AS cdf_prob,
    ROUND(median_days, 0)                         AS median_days,
    ROUND(p75_days, 0)                            AS p75_days,
    ROUND(mean_days, 1)                           AS mean_days,
    CASE WHEN n_total >= 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END     AS n_obs_suficiente,
    dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)          AS transformed_at_gold
FROM survival_cat_setor
WHERE economic_sector <> 'TOTAL'
model.save_data.f_previsibility_survival.compiled_code:
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- SURVIVAL CURVE v11.0
--
-- Mudanças da v10.1 → v11.0:
--   1. Separação de cat: Restituição vs Ressarcimento via perdcomp_type_raw
--   2. Novos thresholds nos primeiros 180 dias: 30, 60, 90 (já existia), 120, 180
--      Thresholds longos mantidos: 270, 365, 540, 730
--   3. Faixas incondicionais atualizadas: 0-90 / 91-180 / 181-365 / 366-730 / >730
--      (pivô agora usa t_dias = 90, 180, 365, 730 como limites de faixa)
--
-- Janela histórica: 24 meses rolling
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

WITH cnpj_excluidos AS (
    SELECT cnpj FROM "save_database"."silver"."silver_external_cnpj_delete_previsibility"
),

perdcomps_excluidos AS (
    SELECT perdcomp FROM "save_database"."silver"."silver_status_perdcomp_delete_previsibility"
),

ids_abertos AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT perdcomp_number
    FROM "save_database"."silver"."silver_excel_control_pers"
    WHERE amount_balance > 0
),

top_setores AS (
    SELECT 'Café (comércio/torrefação)'        AS economic_sector
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Supermercado/hipermercado'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Comércio De Carnes (açougue)'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Abate E Processamento De Carnes'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Hortifrutigranjeiros/frutas'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Confecção/vestuário'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Distribuidor/atacadista Alimentos'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Postos/combustíveis'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Gás/combustíveis'
    UNION ALL SELECT 'Transporte/logística'
),

cnpj_setor AS (
    SELECT
        cnpj,
        CASE
            WHEN economic_sector IN (SELECT economic_sector FROM top_setores)
                THEN economic_sector
            ELSE 'Outros'
        END AS economic_sector
    FROM "save_database"."general"."d_customers_info"
    WHERE cnpj IS NOT NULL
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- BASE FECHADA rolling 24m — v11: separação Restituição / Ressarcimento
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
base_fechada AS (
    SELECT
        a.perdcomp_id,
        b.cnpj,
        CASE
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%compensação de ofício%' THEN 'Compensação/Ofício'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%compensação%'           THEN 'Compensação'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type) LIKE '%indeferimento%'         THEN 'Indeferimento'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%ressarcimento%'     THEN 'Ressarcimento'
            WHEN LOWER(a.perdcomp_type_raw) LIKE '%restitu%'           THEN 'Restituição'
            ELSE a.perdcomp_type
        END AS cat,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, a.date_request, a.date_compensation) AS dias
    FROM "save_database"."operation"."f_excel_tax_recovery" a
    LEFT JOIN "save_database"."silver"."silver_excel_control_pers" b
        ON b.perdcomp_number = a.perdcomp_id OR b.perdcomp_number = a.perdcomp_number
    WHERE b.amount_balance <= 0
      AND a.perdcomp_id NOT IN ('', '0')
      AND a.date_compensation IS NOT NULL
      AND DATEDIFF(DAY, a.date_request, a.date_compensation) > 0
      AND a.perdcomp_id NOT IN (SELECT perdcomp_number FROM ids_abertos)
      AND a.date_compensation >= DATEADD(MONTH, -24, GETDATE())
      AND b.cnpj NOT IN (SELECT cnpj FROM cnpj_excluidos)
      AND REPLACE(REPLACE(a.perdcomp_id, '.', ''), '-', '')
            NOT IN (SELECT perdcomp FROM perdcomps_excluidos)
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- THRESHOLDS: eixo X da curva
-- v11: inclui 90 como limite da nova faixa 0-90
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
thresholds AS (
    SELECT  30 AS t_dias UNION ALL
    SELECT  60           UNION ALL
    SELECT  90           UNION ALL  -- v11: limite faixa 0-90
    SELECT 120           UNION ALL
    SELECT 180           UNION ALL  -- limite faixa 91-180
    SELECT 270           UNION ALL
    SELECT 365           UNION ALL  -- limite faixa 181-365
    SELECT 540           UNION ALL
    SELECT 730                      -- limite faixa 366-730 / >730
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- CURVA POR CAT
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
survival_cat AS (
    SELECT
        t.t_dias,
        bf.cat,
        'TOTAL'                                                             AS economic_sector,
        COUNT(*)                                                            AS n_total,
        SUM(CASE WHEN bf.dias > t.t_dias THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)               AS n_above_t,
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN bf.dias > t.t_dias THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT)
            / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)                                          AS survival_prob,
        sc.median_days,
        sc.p75_days,
        sc.mean_days
    FROM base_fechada bf
    CROSS JOIN thresholds t
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            cat,
            PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias) OVER (PARTITION BY cat) AS median_days,
            PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias) OVER (PARTITION BY cat) AS p75_days,
            AVG(CAST(dias AS FLOAT)) OVER (PARTITION BY cat)                           AS mean_days
        FROM base_fechada
    ) sc ON sc.cat = bf.cat
    GROUP BY t.t_dias, bf.cat, sc.median_days, sc.p75_days, sc.mean_days
),

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- CURVA POR (CAT × SETOR)
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
base_com_setor AS (
    SELECT
        bf.cat,
        COALESCE(cs.economic_sector, 'Outros') AS economic_sector,
        bf.dias
    FROM base_fechada bf
    LEFT JOIN cnpj_setor cs ON cs.cnpj = bf.cnpj
),

survival_cat_setor AS (
    SELECT
        t.t_dias,
        bcs.cat,
        bcs.economic_sector,
        COUNT(*)                                                             AS n_total,
        SUM(CASE WHEN bcs.dias > t.t_dias THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)              AS n_above_t,
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN bcs.dias > t.t_dias THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT)
            / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)                                           AS survival_prob,
        sc2.median_days,
        sc2.p75_days,
        sc2.mean_days
    FROM base_com_setor bcs
    CROSS JOIN thresholds t
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            cat,
            economic_sector,
            PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias)
                OVER (PARTITION BY cat, economic_sector)  AS median_days,
            PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY dias)
                OVER (PARTITION BY cat, economic_sector)  AS p75_days,
            AVG(CAST(dias AS FLOAT))
                OVER (PARTITION BY cat, economic_sector)  AS mean_days
        FROM base_com_setor
    ) sc2 ON sc2.cat = bcs.cat AND sc2.economic_sector = bcs.economic_sector
    GROUP BY t.t_dias, bcs.cat, bcs.economic_sector, sc2.median_days, sc2.p75_days, sc2.mean_days
)

-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- OUTPUT: union cat (TOTAL) + cat×setor
-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SELECT
    t_dias,
    cat,
    economic_sector,
    'cat'                                         AS grain_type,
    n_total,
    n_above_t,
    ROUND(survival_prob, 4)                       AS survival_prob,
    ROUND(1 - survival_prob, 4)                   AS cdf_prob,
    ROUND(median_days, 0)                         AS median_days,
    ROUND(p75_days, 0)                            AS p75_days,
    ROUND(mean_days, 1)                           AS mean_days,
    CASE WHEN n_total >= 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END     AS n_obs_suficiente,
    dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)          AS transformed_at_gold
FROM survival_cat

UNION ALL

SELECT
    t_dias,
    cat,
    economic_sector,
    'cat_setor'                                   AS grain_type,
    n_total,
    n_above_t,
    ROUND(survival_prob, 4)                       AS survival_prob,
    ROUND(1 - survival_prob, 4)                   AS cdf_prob,
    ROUND(median_days, 0)                         AS median_days,
    ROUND(p75_days, 0)                            AS p75_days,
    ROUND(mean_days, 1)                           AS mean_days,
    CASE WHEN n_total >= 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END     AS n_obs_suficiente,
    dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)          AS transformed_at_gold
FROM survival_cat_setor
WHERE economic_sector <> 'TOTAL'

model.save_data.d_hubspot_pipeline_stage.name: d_hubspot_pipeline_stage
model.save_data.d_hubspot_pipeline_stage.description: Dimensão Gold com as etapas dos pipelines de negócios do HubSpot. Passa diretamente da Silver preservando a hierarquia pipeline-estágio, ordens de exibição e flag de fechamento. Usada como lookup em análises de funil de vendas.

deal_stage_id.name: deal_stage_id
deal_stage_id.description: Identificador único da etapa no HubSpot.

pipeline_id.name: pipeline_id
pipeline_id.description: Identificador do pipeline ao qual a etapa pertence.

pipeline_display_order.name: pipeline_display_order
pipeline_display_order.description: Ordem de exibição do pipeline na interface do HubSpot.

stage_id.name: stage_id
stage_id.description: Identificador numérico da etapa dentro do pipeline.

display_order.name: display_order
display_order.description: Ordem de exibição da etapa dentro do pipeline.

is_closed.name: is_closed
is_closed.description: Flag que indica se a etapa representa um fechamento de negócio (1 = sim, 0 = não).

inserted_at.name: inserted_at
inserted_at.description: Data e hora em que o registro foi inserido na camada Bronze.

transformed_at_silver.name: transformed_at_silver
transformed_at_silver.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Silver foi executada.

transformed_at_gold.name: transformed_at_gold
transformed_at_gold.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Gold foi executada.

model.save_data.d_hubspot_pipeline_stage.raw_code:
{{ config(

model.save_data.silver_bitrix_company.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized='table',
    post_hook=[
        "CREATE INDEX idx_company_created_at ON {{ this }} (created_at)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_company_modified_at ON {{ this }} (modified_at)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_company_assigned_to_user_id ON {{ this }} (assigned_to_user_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_company_company_name ON {{ this }} (company_name)"
    ]
) }}

WITH source AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_bitrix_company') }}

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT
        -- keys
        cast(try_cast(id as decimal(18,2)) as int)                        as company_id,

        -- audit / ownership
        dateadd(hour, -6, cast(date_create as datetime2))                 as created_at,
        dateadd(hour, -6, cast(date_modify as datetime2))                 as modified_at,
        cast(try_cast(created_by_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)             as created_by_user_id,
        cast(try_cast(modify_by_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)              as modified_by_user_id,
        cast(try_cast(assigned_by_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)            as assigned_to_user_id,

        -- business attributes

        CAST(NULLIF(
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(title),' ')
                ), '')
                AS varchar(255))                                            AS company_name,
        cast(opened as varchar(255))                                        as opened,

        CAST(NULLIF(
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(address_city),' ')
                ), '')
                AS varchar(255))                                            AS address_city,
        CAST(NULLIF(
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(address_postal_code),' ')
                ), '')
                AS varchar(255))                                            as address_postal_code,
        CAST(NULLIF(
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(address_region),' ')
                ), '')
                AS varchar(255))                                            as address_region,

        CAST(NULLIF(
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(address_country),' ')
                ), '')
                AS varchar(255))                                            as address_country,    


        cast(address_country_code as varchar(50))                           as address_country_code,

        cast(banking_details as varchar(max))                               as banking_details,
        CAST(NULLIF(
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(comments),' ')
                ), '')
                AS varchar(255))                                            as comments, 

        cast(company_type_name as varchar(255))                             as company_type_name,

        cast(try_cast(revenue as decimal(18,2)) as decimal(18,2))          as revenue,
        cast(currency_id as varchar(50))                                    as currency_id,
        cast(employees as varchar(50))                                      as employees,
        cast(is_my_company as varchar(50))                                  as is_my_company,

        cast(trim(lower(replace(phone, '[WORK] ', ''))) as varchar(255))    as phone,
        cast(web as varchar(500))                                           as website,
        cast(trim(lower(replace(email, '[WORK] ', ''))) as varchar(255))    as email,

        -- ingestion / source
        cast(inserted_at as datetime2)                                      as inserted_at,
        cast(system_source as varchar(100))                                 as system_source,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)                                as transformed_at_silver

    FROM source

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

model.save_data.silver_bitrix_deal_analy.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized='table',
    post_hook=[
        "CREATE INDEX idx_deal_product_row_deal_id ON {{ this }} (deal_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_deal_product_row_product_id ON {{ this }} (product_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_deal_product_row_deal_created_at ON {{ this }} (deal_created_at)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_deal_product_row_deal_closed_at ON {{ this }} (deal_closed_at)"
    ]
) }}

WITH source AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_bitrix_deal_product_row') }}

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT
        -- keys
        cast(id as int)                                        as deal_product_row_id,
        cast(deal_id as int)                                   as deal_id,
        cast(product_id as int)                                as product_id,

        -- deal relationship
        DATEADD(hour, -6, cast(deal_date_create as datetime2)) as deal_created_at,
        DATEADD(hour, -6, cast(deal_closedate as datetime2))   as deal_closed_at,

        -- product attributes
        CAST(
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(product_name),' ')
                )
                AS varchar(255))                               as product_name,
        cast(price as decimal(18,2))                           as price,
        cast(price_exclusive as decimal(18,2))                 as price_exclusive,
        cast(price_netto as decimal(18,2))                     as price_net_amount,
        cast(price_brutto as decimal(18,2))                    as price_gross_amount,
        cast(quantity as decimal(18,2))                        as quantity,

        -- discounts / taxes
        cast(discount_type_id as int)                          as discount_type_id,
        cast(discount_rate as decimal(18,2))                   as discount_rate,
        cast(discount_sum as decimal(18,2))                    as discount_amount,
        cast(tax_rate as decimal(18,2))                        as tax_rate,
        cast(tax_included as varchar(50))                      as tax_included,

        -- classification / hierarchy
        cast(customized as varchar(50))                        as is_customized,
        cast(measure_code as varchar(50))                      as measure_code,
        cast(measure_name as varchar(100))                     as measure_name,
        cast(sort as int)                                      as sort_order,
        cast(category_name as varchar(255))                    as category_name,
        cast(parent as varchar(255))                           as parent_category_name,
        cast(superparent as varchar(255))                      as superparent_category_name,
        cast(supersuperparent as varchar(255))                 as supersuperparent_category_name,

        -- ingestion / source
        cast(inserted_at as datetime2)                         as inserted_at,
        cast('bitrix' as varchar(100))                         as system_source,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)                   as transformed_at_silver

    FROM source

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

model.save_data.silver_bitrix_deal_custo.description: Modelo da camada Silver com dados complementares das negociações do Bitrix provenientes de campos personalizados (UFs - User Fields). Este modelo padroniza nomes de colunas, converte tipos de dados, normaliza documentos como CNPJ removendo caracteres especiais e organiza informações de parceiro, localização e comissão para consumo analítico posterior.

deal_id.name: deal_id
deal_id.description: Identificador da negociação associada aos campos personalizados.

partner_name.name: partner_name
partner_name.description: Nome do parceiro externo associado à negociação. Caso não exista parceiro informado, o valor padrão será "Sem parceiro externo".

commission_percent.name: commission_percent
commission_percent.description: Percentual de comissão associado ao parceiro externo da negociação.

state.name: state
state.description: Estado associado à negociação conforme informado nos campos personalizados.

city.name: city
city.description: Cidade associada à negociação conforme informado nos campos personalizados.

street_avenue.name: street_avenue
street_avenue.description: Rua ou avenida associada ao endereço da negociação.

cnpj.name: cnpj
cnpj.description: CNPJ associado à negociação, normalizado sem caracteres especiais como pontos, barras, hífens ou espaços.

inserted_at.name: inserted_at
inserted_at.description: Data e hora em que o registro foi inserido na camada Bronze.

system_source.name: system_source
system_source.description: Nome do sistema de origem do registro.

transformed_at_silver.name: transformed_at_silver
transformed_at_silver.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Silver foi executada.

model.save_data.silver_bitrix_deal_custo.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized='table',
    post_hook=[
        "CREATE INDEX idx_deal_partner_deal_id ON {{ this }} (deal_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_deal_partner_name ON {{ this }} (partner_name)"
        "CREATE INDEX idx_deal_cnpj ON {{ this }} (cnpj)"
    ]
) }}

WITH source AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_bitrix_deal_uf') }}

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT

        -- keys
        CAST(try_cast(deal_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)                   as deal_id,

        -- partner attributes
       CAST(
            CASE 
                WHEN uf_crm_1761327651 = '' OR uf_crm_1761327651 IS NULL
                THEN 'Sem parceiro externo'
                ELSE uf_crm_1761327651
            END                                                               
        AS varchar(255)
       )                                                    as partner_name,

        cast(try_cast(uf_crm_1674504869 as float) as float)/100           as commission_percent,

        -- location
        CAST(NULLIF(
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(uf_crm_1758224216498),' ')
                ), '')
                AS varchar(255))                                            AS state,

        CAST(NULLIF(
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(uf_crm_1672781757),' ')
                ), '')
                AS varchar(255))                                            AS city,

        CAST(NULLIF(
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(uf_crm_1672781723),' ')
                ), '')
                AS varchar(255))                                            AS address,

        CAST(NULLIF(
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(uf_crm_1673994278222),' ')
                ), '')
                AS varchar(255))                                            AS neighborhood,
        -- document normalization
        CAST(
            TRIM(
                REPLACE(
                    REPLACE(
                        REPLACE(
                            REPLACE(uf_crm_63c14d3c80814, '-', ''),
                        '.', ''),
                    '/', ''),
                ' ', '')
            ) AS varchar(14)
                                                      )                   as cnpj,

        -- ingestion
        cast(inserted_at as datetime2)                                    as inserted_at,
        cast(system_source as varchar(100))                               as system_source,

        -- transformation timestamp
        dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)                              as transformed_at_silver
        
    FROM source

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

model.save_data.silver_bitrix_deal_sinth.name: silver_bitrix_deal_sinthetic
model.save_data.silver_bitrix_deal_sinth.description: Modelo da camada Silver com dados de negociações (deals) do Bitrix. Este modelo padroniza nomes de colunas, converte tipos de dados, formata campos textuais como nome da empresa e título da negociação, e normaliza valores monetários para facilitar o consumo analítico. Também adiciona metadados de ingestão e transformação para rastreabilidade.

deal_id.name: deal_id
deal_id.description: Identificador único da negociação no Bitrix.

lead_id.name: lead_id
lead_id.description: Identificador do lead associado à negociação.

company_id.name: company_id
company_id.description: Identificador da empresa associada à negociação.

contact_id.name: contact_id
contact_id.description: Identificador do contato vinculado à negociação.

crm_product_id.name: crm_product_id
crm_product_id.description: Identificador do produto CRM associado à negociação.

category_id.name: category_id
category_id.description: Identificador da categoria da negociação no pipeline de vendas.

stage_id.name: stage_id
stage_id.description: Identificador do estágio da negociação no pipeline.

stage_semantic_id.name: stage_semantic_id
stage_semantic_id.description: Identificador semântico do estágio da negociação (ex. sucesso, perda, em andamento).

location_id.name: location_id
location_id.description: Identificador da localização associada à negociação.

webform_id.name: webform_id
webform_id.description: Identificador do formulário web que originou a negociação.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.description: Data e hora de criação da negociação no sistema de origem.

modified_at.name: modified_at
modified_at.description: Data e hora da última modificação da negociação no sistema de origem.

created_by_user_id.name: created_by_user_id
created_by_user_id.description: Identificador do usuário que criou a negociação.

modified_by_user_id.name: modified_by_user_id
modified_by_user_id.description: Identificador do usuário que realizou a última modificação na negociação.

assigned_to_user_id.name: assigned_to_user_id
assigned_to_user_id.description: Identificador do usuário responsável pela negociação.

moved_by_user_id.name: moved_by_user_id
moved_by_user_id.description: Identificador do usuário que realizou a última movimentação de estágio da negociação.

moved_at.name: moved_at
moved_at.description: Data e hora da última movimentação de estágio da negociação.

opened.name: opened
opened.description: Indicador se a negociação está aberta no Bitrix.

company_name.name: company_name
company_name.description: Nome da empresa associado à negociação, formatado em padrão de capitalização.

deal_title.name: deal_title
deal_title.description: Título da negociação, formatado em padrão de capitalização.

category_name.name: category_name
category_name.description: Nome da categoria da negociação no pipeline.

stage_name.name: stage_name
stage_name.description: Nome do estágio atual da negociação no pipeline.

stage_semantic.name: stage_semantic
stage_semantic.description: Classificação semântica do estágio da negociação (ex. sucesso, perda, em progresso).

is_new.name: is_new
is_new.description: Indicador se a negociação é marcada como nova.

is_recurring.name: is_recurring
is_recurring.description: Indicador se a negociação é recorrente.

is_return_customer.name: is_return_customer
is_return_customer.description: Indicador se a negociação envolve um cliente recorrente.

closed.name: closed
closed.description: Indicador se a negociação está encerrada.

is_manual_opportunity.name: is_manual_opportunity
is_manual_opportunity.description: Indicador se o valor da negociação foi informado manualmente.

tax_amount.name: tax_amount
tax_amount.description: Valor de imposto associado à negociação.

currency_id.name: currency_id
currency_id.description: Moeda associada ao valor da negociação.

account_amount.name: account_amount
account_amount.description: Valor da negociação convertido para a moeda da conta.

account_tax_amount.name: account_tax_amount
account_tax_amount.description: Valor de imposto da negociação convertido para a moeda da conta.

account_currency_id.name: account_currency_id
account_currency_id.description: Moeda da conta utilizada nos valores contábeis da negociação.

comments.name: comments
comments.description: Comentários ou observações livres associadas à negociação.

close_at.name: close_at
close_at.description: Data prevista ou efetiva de fechamento da negociação.

source_name.name: source_name
source_name.description: Nome da origem da negociação (ex. campanha, formulário ou canal de aquisição).

inserted_at.name: inserted_at
inserted_at.description: Data e hora em que o registro foi inserido na camada Bronze.

system_source.name: system_source
system_source.description: Nome do sistema de origem do registro.

transformed_at_silver.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Silver foi executada.

model.save_data.silver_bitrix_deal_sinth.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized='table',
    post_hook=[
        "CREATE INDEX idx_deal_company_id ON {{ this }} (company_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_deal_contact_id ON {{ this }} (contact_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_deal_created_at ON {{ this }} (created_at)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_deal_stage_id ON {{ this }} (stage_id)"
    ]
) }}

WITH source AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_bitrix_deal') }}

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT
        -- keys
        cast(try_cast(id as decimal(18,2)) as int)             as deal_id,
        cast(try_cast(lead_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)        as lead_id,
        cast(try_cast(company_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)     as company_id,
        cast(try_cast(contact_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)     as contact_id,
        cast(try_cast(crm_product_id as decimal(18,2)) as int) as crm_product_id,
        cast(try_cast(category_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)    as category_id,
        cast(stage_id as varchar(100))                         as stage_id,
        cast(stage_semantic_id as varchar(100))                as stage_semantic_id,
        cast(try_cast(location_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)    as location_id,
        cast(try_cast(webform_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)     as webform_id,

        -- audit / ownership
        dateadd(hour, -6, cast(date_create as datetime2))      as created_at,
        dateadd(hour, -6, cast(date_modify as datetime2))      as modified_at,
        cast(created_by_id as int)                             as created_by_user_id,
        cast(modify_by_id as int)                              as modified_by_user_id,
        cast(assigned_by_id as int)                            as assigned_to_user_id,
        cast(moved_by_id as int)                               as moved_by_user_id,
        dateadd(hour, -6, cast(moved_time as datetime2))       as moved_at,

        -- business attributes
        cast(opened as varchar(50))                            as opened,
        CAST(
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(company_name),' ')
                )
                AS varchar(255)) AS company_name,
        CAST(
            (
                SELECT STRING_AGG(
                    UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                    ' '
                )
                FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(title),' ')
            )
            AS varchar(255))                                   AS deal_title,    
        cast(category_name as varchar(255))                    as category_name,
        cast(stage_name as varchar(255))                       as stage_name,
        cast(stage_semantic as varchar(255))                   as stage_semantic,
        cast(is_new as varchar(50))                            as is_new,
        cast(is_recurring as varchar(50))                      as is_recurring,
        cast(is_return_customer as varchar(50))                as is_return_customer,
        cast(closed as varchar(50))                            as closed,

        cast(opportunity as decimal(18,2))                     as amount,
        cast(is_manual_opportunity as varchar(50))             as is_manual_opportunity,
        cast(tax_value as decimal(18,2))                       as tax_amount,
        cast(currency_id as varchar(50))                       as currency_id,
        cast(opportunity_account as decimal(18,2))             as account_amount,
        cast(tax_value_account as decimal(18,2))               as account_tax_amount,
        cast(account_currency_id as varchar(50))               as account_currency_id,
        cast(probability as decimal(5,2))                      as probability,

        cast(comments as varchar(max))                         as comments,
        dateadd(hour, -6, cast(begindate as datetime2))        as begin_at,
        dateadd(hour, -6, cast(closedate as datetime2))        as close_at,
        cast(source_name as varchar(255))                      as source_name,

        -- ingestion / source
        cast(inserted_at as datetime2)                         as inserted_at,
        cast(system_source as varchar(100))                    as system_source,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)                   as transformed_at_silver

    FROM source

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

model.save_data.silver_bitrix_deal_stage.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized='table',
    post_hook=[
        "CREATE INDEX idx_dynamic_items_162_ideal_id ON {{ this }} (ideal_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_dynamic_items_162_created_at ON {{ this }} (created_at)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_dynamic_items_162_close_date ON {{ this }} (close_date)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_dynamic_items_162_category_id ON {{ this }} (category_id)"
    ]
) }}

WITH source AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_bitrix_dynamic_items_162') }}

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT

        -- keys
        cast(try_cast(id as decimal(18,2)) as int)                       as dynamic_item_id,

        -- business identifiers
        cast(REPLACE(xml_id,'D_','') as varchar(100))                    as ideal_id,

        -- ownership
        cast(created_by_name as varchar(255))                            as created_by_name,
        cast(stage_name as varchar(255))                                 as stage_name,

        -- title normalization
        CAST(
   
                (
                    SELECT STRING_AGG(
                        UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))),
                        ' '
                    )
                    FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(title),' ')
                )
       
        AS varchar(255))                                                 as title,

        -- timestamps (timezone ajustado)
        dateadd(hour,-6,cast(created_time as datetime2))                 as created_at,

        -- business dates
        cast(uf_crm_6_1682698206 as date)                                          as close_date,

        -- financial attributes
        cast(try_cast(opportunity as decimal(18,2)) as decimal(18,2))    as amount,

        -- category
        cast(try_cast(category_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)              as category_id,

        -- ingestion
        cast(inserted_at as datetime2)                                   as inserted_at,

        -- transformation timestamp
        dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)                             as transformed_at_silver

    FROM source

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

        -- department levels (alt names)
