        dep1_n,
        dep2_n,
        dep3_n,
        inserted_at
    from "save_database"."bronze"."bronze_bitrix_user"

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT 
        -- keys
        cast(try_cast(id as decimal(18,2)) as int)             as user_id,

        -- status / attributes
        cast(active as varchar(255))                           as active,
        cast(name as varchar(255))                             as user_name,

        -- department (raw + normalized)
        cast(department as varchar(255))                       as department,
        cast(department_ids as varchar(255))                   as department_ids,

        cast(try_cast(department_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)  as department_id,
        cast(department_name as varchar(255))                  as department_name,
        cast(department_id_name as varchar(255))               as department_id_name,

        -- department levels (names)
        cast(dep1 as varchar(255))                             as dep_level_1_name,
        cast(dep2 as varchar(255))                             as dep_level_2_name,
        cast(dep3 as varchar(255))                             as dep_level_3_name,

        -- department levels (ids)
        cast(try_cast(dep1_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)        as dep_level_1_id,
        cast(try_cast(dep2_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)        as dep_level_2_id,
        cast(try_cast(dep3_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)        as dep_level_3_id,

        -- department levels (alt names)
        cast(dep1_n as varchar(255))                           as dep_level_1_label,
        cast(dep2_n as varchar(255))                           as dep_level_2_label,
        cast(dep3_n as varchar(255))                           as dep_level_3_label,

        -- ingestion / audit
        cast(inserted_at as datetime2)                         as inserted_at,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)                   as transformed_at_silver

    FROM source

)

select *
FROM transformer

model.save_data.silver_excel_control_dco.name: silver_excel_control_dcomps

Este modelo padroniza nomes de colunas para inglês, converte tipos de dados, aplica prefixos de nomenclatura (amount_, date_, is_) e organiza as informações de crédito, débito e compensação tributária para consumo analítico posterior.

dcomp_id.name: dcomp_id
dcomp_id.description: Identificador único do registro de DCOMP.

dcomp_number.name: dcomp_number
dcomp_number.description: Número da DCOMP (Declaração de Compensação) conforme emitida na Receita Federal.

code.name: code
code.description: Código do tributo ou processo associado ao registro.

batch_id.name: batch_id
batch_id.description: Identificador do lote de importação ao qual o registro pertence.

tax_credit_type.name: tax_credit_type
tax_credit_type.description: Tipo de crédito tributário utilizado na compensação.

tax_type.name: tax_type
tax_type.description: Tipo do tributo envolvido na declaração de compensação.

reference_pers.name: reference_pers
reference_pers.description: Período de referência da competência tributária do crédito.

status.name: status
status.description: Status atual da DCOMP no processo de compensação.

rectifying_dcomp_number.name: rectifying_dcomp_number
rectifying_dcomp_number.description: Número da DCOMP original que este documento retifica. Nulo quando o próprio documento é o original.

date_competencia.name: date_competencia
date_competencia.description: Data de competência tributária do crédito declarado.

date_compensated.name: date_compensated
date_compensated.description: Data em que a compensação foi efetivada.

amount_original_credit.name: amount_original_credit
amount_original_credit.description: Valor original do crédito tributário antes de atualizações monetárias.

amount_selic_update.name: amount_selic_update
amount_selic_update.description: Valor de atualização do crédito pela taxa SELIC.

amount_available_balance.name: amount_available_balance
amount_available_balance.description: Saldo disponível do crédito para compensação.

amount_original.name: amount_original
amount_original.description: Valor original do débito tributário a ser compensado.

amount_penalty_interest.name: amount_penalty_interest
amount_penalty_interest.description: Valor de multa e juros incidentes sobre o débito tributário.

amount_updated.name: amount_updated
amount_updated.description: Valor atualizado do débito tributário incluindo multa e juros.

amount_requested.description: Valor solicitado para compensação na DCOMP.

amount_compensated_2.name: amount_compensated_2
amount_compensated_2.description: Segundo valor compensado registrado no controle (campo complementar da planilha de origem).

amount_residual_guide.description: Valor residual da guia após a compensação.

model.save_data.silver_excel_control_dco.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized='table',
    post_hook=[
        "CREATE INDEX idx_silver_dcomp_id ON {{ this }} (dcomp_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_silver_dcomp_status ON {{ this }} (status)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_silver_dcomp_date_competencia ON {{ this }} (date_competencia)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_silver_dcomp_date_compensated ON {{ this }} (date_compensated)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_silver_dcomp_lote_id ON {{ this }} (lote_id)"
    ]
) }}

WITH source AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_excel_control_dcomps') }}

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT

        -- keys
        cast(id as int)                                             as dcomp_id,

        -- identification
        cast(dcomp as varchar(255))                                 as dcomp_number,
        cast(codigo as varchar(100))                                as code,
        cast(lote_id as varchar(100))                               as lote_id,

        -- tax attributes
        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(tributo_credito), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(255))                                            as tax_credit_type,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(tributo), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(100))                                            as tax_type,

        cast(per_referencia as varchar(100))                        as reference_pers,

        -- status / flags
        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(status), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(100))                                            as status,
        cast(retificada as varchar(255))                            as rectifying_dcomp_number,

        -- dates
        cast(competencia as date)                                   as date_competencia,
        cast(data_compensacao as date)                              as date_compensated,

        -- amounts — credit
        cast(credito_original as decimal(18,2))                     as amount_original_credit,
        cast(atualizacao_selic as decimal(18,2))                    as amount_selic_update,
        cast(saldo_disponivel as decimal(18,2))                     as amount_available_balance,

        -- amounts — debt
        cast(valor_original as decimal(18,2))                       as amount_original,
        cast(multa_juros as decimal(18,2))                          as amount_penalty_interest,
        cast(valor_atualizado as decimal(18,2))                     as amount_updated,

        -- amounts — compensation
        cast(valor_pedido as decimal(18,2))                         as amount_requested,
        cast(valor_compensado as decimal(18,2))                     as amount_compensated,
        cast(valor_compensado2 as decimal(18,2))                    as amount_compensated_2,
        cast(guia_residual as decimal(18,2))                        as amount_residual_guide,

        -- ingestion
        cast(insert_at as datetime2)                                as inserted_at,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        current_timestamp                                           as transformed_at_silver

    FROM source

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer
WHERE 0=0 AND tax_credit_type <> 'Saldo'

model.save_data.silver_excel_control_per.name: silver_excel_control_pers
model.save_data.silver_excel_control_per.description: Modelo da camada Silver com dados de controle de PERDCOMPs (Pedidos Eletrônicos de Restituição, Ressarcimento, Reembolso ou Compensação) provenientes de planilhas Excel. Este modelo padroniza nomes de colunas para inglês, converte tipos de dados, aplica normalização de CNPJ, prefixos de nomenclatura (amount_, date_, is_) e organiza as informações de parceiro, tese tributária, compensações e saldos para consumo analítico posterior.

perdcomp_number.name: perdcomp_number
perdcomp_number.description: Número do PERDCOMP (Pedido Eletrônico de Restituição/Ressarcimento/Compensação) conforme emitido na Receita Federal.

partner_name.name: partner_name
partner_name.description: Nome do parceiro associado ao PERDCOMP.

attorney_name.name: attorney_name
attorney_name.description: Nome do procurador responsável pelo PERDCOMP.

technical_responsible.name: technical_responsible
technical_responsible.description: Nome do responsável técnico pelo processo.

user_name.name: user_name
user_name.description: Nome do usuário que registrou ou atualizou o controle.

cnpj.name: cnpj
cnpj.description: CNPJ da empresa associada ao PERDCOMP, normalizado sem pontuação e limitado a 14 caracteres.

company_name.name: company_name
company_name.description: Nome da empresa associada ao PERDCOMP.

thesis.name: thesis
thesis.description: Tese tributária utilizada como base para o pedido de restituição ou compensação.

type.name: type
type.description: Tipo do PERDCOMP conforme classificação da origem.

tax_type.name: tax_type
tax_type.description: Tipo do tributo envolvido no pedido.

month_quarter.name: month_quarter
month_quarter.description: Mês ou trimestre de referência do período tributário.

year.name: year
year.description: Ano de referência do período tributário.

status.name: status
status.description: Status atual do PERDCOMP no processo de análise ou compensação.

rectifying_perdcomp_number.name: rectifying_perdcomp_number
rectifying_perdcomp_number.description: Número do PERDCOMP original que este documento retifica. Nulo quando o próprio documento é o original.

date_request.name: date_request
date_request.description: Data de envio ou protocolo do pedido na Receita Federal.

date_notice.name: date_notice
date_notice.description: Data do aviso ou notificação recebida sobre o PERDCOMP.

amount_requested.name: amount_requested
amount_requested.description: Valor total requerido no pedido de compensação ou restituição.

amount_selic_compensated.name: amount_selic_compensated
amount_selic_compensated.description: Valor de atualização SELIC incidente sobre o montante compensado.

amount_office_compensation.name: amount_office_compensation
amount_office_compensation.description: Valor de compensação de ofício realizada pela Receita Federal.

amount_selic_office.name: amount_selic_office
amount_selic_office.description: Valor de SELIC incidente sobre a compensação de ofício.

amount_restituted_reimbursed.name: amount_restituted_reimbursed
amount_restituted_reimbursed.description: Valor total restituído ou ressarcido pela Receita Federal.

amount_selic.name: amount_selic
amount_selic.description: Valor de atualização SELIC aplicada ao crédito tributário.

amount_denial.name: amount_denial
amount_denial.description: Valor indeferido pela Receita Federal no processo de análise.

amount_balance.name: amount_balance
amount_balance.description: Saldo remanescente do crédito após compensações e indeferimentos.

inserted_at.name: inserted_at
inserted_at.description: Data e hora em que o registro foi inserido na camada Bronze.

updated_at.name: updated_at
updated_at.description: Data e hora da última atualização do registro na camada Bronze.

transformed_at_silver.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Silver foi executada.

model.save_data.silver_excel_control_per.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized='table',
    post_hook=[
        "CREATE INDEX idx_silver_pers_perdcomp_number ON {{ this }} (perdcomp_number)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_silver_pers_cnpj ON {{ this }} (cnpj)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_silver_pers_status ON {{ this }} (status)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_silver_pers_date_request ON {{ this }} (date_request)"
    ]
) }}

WITH source AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_excel_control_pers') }}

),

cleaned AS (

    SELECT *,
        TRIM(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cnpj, '-', ''), '.', ''), '/', ''), ' ', '')) as cnpj_clean
    FROM source

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT

        -- identification
        cast(perdcomp as varchar(255))                                                      as perdcomp_number,

        -- ownership
        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(parceiro), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(255))                                                                    as partner_name,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(procurador), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(255))                                                                    as attorney_name,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(responsavel_tecnico), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(255))                                                                    as technical_responsible,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(usuario), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(255))                                                                    as user_name,

        -- company attributes
        case
            when len(cnpj_clean) = 14 then cnpj_clean
            when len(cnpj_clean) = 13 then concat('0',   cnpj_clean)
            when len(cnpj_clean) = 12 then concat('00',  cnpj_clean)
            when len(cnpj_clean) = 11 then concat('000', cnpj_clean)
                                      else cnpj_clean
        end                                                                                 as cnpj,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(nome_empresa), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(255))                                                                    as company_name,

        -- tax attributes
        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(tese), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(255))                                                                    as thesis,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(tipo), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(100))                                                                    as type,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(tributo), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(100))                                                                    as tax_type,

        cast(try_cast(mes_tri as decimal(18,2)) as int)                                    as month_quarter,
        cast(try_cast(ano as decimal(18,2)) as int)                                        as year,

        -- status / flags
        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(status), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(100))                                                                    as status,

        cast(retificadora as varchar(255))                                                  as rectifying_perdcomp_number,

        -- dates
        cast(data_pedido as date)                                                           as date_request,
        cast(aviso as date)                                                                 as date_notice,

        -- amounts — requested / compensated
        cast(valor_requerido as decimal(18,2))                                             as amount_requested,
        cast(valor_compensado as decimal(18,2))                                            as amount_compensated,
        cast(selic_compensada as decimal(18,2))                                            as amount_selic_compensated,

        -- amounts — office compensation
        cast(compensacao_oficio as decimal(18,2))                                          as amount_office_compensation,
        cast(selic_c_o as decimal(18,2))                                                   as amount_selic_office,

        -- amounts — restitution / reimbursement
        cast(valor_restituido_ressarcido as decimal(18,2))                                 as amount_restituted_reimbursed,
        cast(selic as decimal(18,2))                                                       as amount_selic,

        -- amounts — outcome
        cast(indeferimento as decimal(18,2))                                               as amount_denial,
        cast(saldo as decimal(18,2))                                                       as amount_balance,

        -- ingestion
        cast(insert_at as datetime2)                                                       as inserted_at,
        cast(updated_at as datetime2)                                                      as updated_at,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        current_timestamp                                                                  as transformed_at_silver

    FROM cleaned

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

model.save_data.silver_excel_reimburseme.description: Modelo da camada Silver com dados de recebimentos de recuperação tributária provenientes de planilhas Excel. Este modelo é utilizado como referência de data de recebimento/proveito na fato f_excel_tax_recovery, quando não há data de compensação registrada na DCOMP nem aviso no PERDCOMP.

perdcomp_number.name: perdcomp_number
perdcomp_number.description: Número do PERDCOMP associado ao recebimento.

amount.name: amount
amount.description: Valor do recebimento correspondente ao pedido.

date_receipt_period.name: date_receipt_period
date_receipt_period.description: Período de recebimento efetivo do crédito tributário.

transformed_at_silver.name: transformed_at_silver
transformed_at_silver.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Silver foi executada.

    ]
) }}

)

model.save_data.silver_external_cnpj_cus.name: silver_external_cnpj_customers_info
model.save_data.silver_external_cnpj_cus.description: Tabela Silver sobre bronze_external_cnpj_customers_info. Contém dados de enriquecimento de CNPJs obtidos via BrasilAPI, com informações de CNAE principal e secundários, classificação setorial em múltiplos níveis (setor econômico, macro setor, setores secundários), regime tributário (Simples/MEI), situação cadastral completa, endereço, contato e datas de movimentação cadastral de cada empresa. Campos descritivos normalizados em Pascal Case.

cnpj.name: cnpj
cnpj.description: CNPJ da empresa, 14 dígitos sem formatação.

company_name.name: company_name
company_name.description: Razão social da empresa retornada pela BrasilAPI. Armazenada em Pascal Case.

trade_name.name: trade_name
trade_name.description: Nome fantasia da empresa. Armazenado em Pascal Case.

legal_nature.name: legal_nature
legal_nature.description: Natureza jurídica da empresa (ex. Sociedade Empresária Limitada). Armazenada em Pascal Case.

legal_nature_code.name: legal_nature_code
legal_nature_code.description: Código numérico da natureza jurídica conforme tabela da Receita Federal.

company_size.name: company_size
company_size.description: Porte da empresa conforme Receita Federal (ex. Micro Empresa, Empresa De Pequeno Porte). Armazenado em Pascal Case.

amount_capital.name: amount_capital
amount_capital.description: Capital social declarado da empresa em reais.

is_simples.name: is_simples
is_simples.description: Indica se a empresa é optante pelo Simples Nacional (S/N).

date_simples_enrollment.name: date_simples_enrollment
date_simples_enrollment.description: Data de opção da empresa pelo Simples Nacional.

date_simples_exclusion.name: date_simples_exclusion
date_simples_exclusion.description: Data de exclusão da empresa do Simples Nacional, quando aplicável.

is_mei.name: is_mei
is_mei.description: Indica se a empresa é optante pelo MEI (S/N).

date_mei_enrollment.name: date_mei_enrollment
date_mei_enrollment.description: Data de opção da empresa pelo MEI.

date_mei_exclusion.name: date_mei_exclusion
date_mei_exclusion.description: Data de exclusão da empresa do MEI, quando aplicável.

date_start_activity.name: date_start_activity
date_start_activity.description: Data de início das atividades da empresa conforme Receita Federal.

cnae_principal.name: cnae_principal
cnae_principal.description: Código CNAE principal da empresa (até 7 dígitos).

cnae_division.name: cnae_division
cnae_division.description: Divisão CNAE — 2 primeiros dígitos do cnae_principal, usada para agrupamento de setor.

cnae_description.name: cnae_description
cnae_description.description: Descrição oficial do CNAE principal. Armazenada em Pascal Case.

cnae_secondary_codes.name: cnae_secondary_codes
cnae_secondary_codes.description: Lista de códigos CNAE secundários da empresa, separados por vírgula.

cnae_secondary_count.name: cnae_secondary_count
cnae_secondary_count.description: Quantidade de CNAEs secundários cadastrados para a empresa.

economic_sector.name: economic_sector
economic_sector.description: Classificação de setor econômico derivada do CNAE e razão social. Armazenada em Pascal Case.

macro_sector.name: macro_sector
macro_sector.description: Agrupamento macro do setor econômico (ex. Indústria, Comércio, Serviços). Armazenado em Pascal Case.

main_secondary_sector.name: main_secondary_sector
main_secondary_sector.description: Setor secundário de maior relevância identificado para a empresa. Armazenado em Pascal Case.

secondary_sectors.name: secondary_sectors
secondary_sectors.description: Lista de setores secundários associados à empresa, separados por vírgula ou em formato JSON.

economic_sector_source.name: economic_sector_source
economic_sector_source.description: Indica a origem da classificação do setor econômico (ex. Cnae, Manual). Armazenado em Pascal Case.

registration_status.name: registration_status
registration_status.description: Situação cadastral na Receita Federal (ex. Ativa, Baixada, Inapta). Armazenada em Pascal Case.

date_registration_status.name: date_registration_status
date_registration_status.description: Data em que a situação cadastral foi atualizada para o status atual.

registration_status_reason.name: registration_status_reason
registration_status_reason.description: Descrição do motivo da situação cadastral atual. Armazenada em Pascal Case.

special_status.name: special_status
special_status.description: Situação especial da empresa junto à Receita Federal, quando aplicável. Armazenada em Pascal Case.

date_special_status.name: date_special_status
date_special_status.description: Data de início da situação especial, quando aplicável.

uf.name: uf
uf.description: Sigla do estado (UF) da sede da empresa.

municipality.name: municipality
municipality.description: Município da sede da empresa. Armazenado em Pascal Case.

municipality_ibge_code.name: municipality_ibge_code
municipality_ibge_code.description: Código IBGE do município da sede da empresa.

cep.description: CEP da sede da empresa, 8 dígitos sem formatação.

street_type.name: street_type
street_type.description: Tipo de logradouro da sede da empresa (ex. Rua, Avenida, Rodovia). Armazenado em Pascal Case.

street_address.name: street_address
street_address.description: Logradouro da sede da empresa. Armazenado em Pascal Case.

street_number.name: street_number
street_number.description: Número do endereço da sede da empresa.

address_complement.name: address_complement
address_complement.description: Complemento do endereço da sede da empresa. Armazenado em Pascal Case.

neighborhood.name: neighborhood
neighborhood.description: Bairro da sede da empresa. Armazenado em Pascal Case.

phone_1.name: phone_1
phone_1.description: DDD e número do telefone principal da empresa.

phone_2.name: phone_2
phone_2.description: DDD e número do telefone secundário da empresa, quando disponível.

transformed_at_bronze.name: transformed_at_bronze
transformed_at_bronze.description: Data e hora em que o registro foi gerado pelo script de enriquecimento e gravado na camada Bronze.

transformed_at_silver.name: transformed_at_silver
transformed_at_silver.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Silver foi executada.

model.save_data.silver_external_cnpj_cus.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized='table',
    post_hook=[
        "CREATE INDEX idx_silver_ext_cnpj_info_cnpj ON {{ this }} (cnpj)"
    ]
) }}

WITH source AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_external_cnpj_customers_info') }}

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT

        -- identification
        cast(cnpj as varchar(14))                                                   as cnpj,

        -- company attributes
        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(razao_social), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(500))                                                             as company_name,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(nome_fantasia), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(500))                                                             as trade_name,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(natureza_juridica), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(200))                                                             as legal_nature,

        cast(codigo_natureza_juridica as varchar(10))                               as legal_nature_code,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(porte), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(100))                                                             as company_size,

        cast(try_cast(capital_social as decimal(18,2)) as decimal(18,2))            as amount_capital,

        cast(opcao_simples as varchar(5))                                            as is_simples,
        cast(data_opcao_pelo_simples as date)                                        as date_simples_enrollment,
        cast(data_exclusao_do_simples as date)                                       as date_simples_exclusion,

        cast(opcao_mei as varchar(5))                                                as is_mei,
        cast(data_opcao_pelo_mei as date)                                            as date_mei_enrollment,
        cast(data_exclusao_do_mei as date)                                           as date_mei_exclusion,

        cast(data_inicio_atividade as date)                                          as date_start_activity,

        -- cnae
        cast(cnae_principal as varchar(10))                                          as cnae_principal,
        cast(cnae_divisao as varchar(5))                                             as cnae_division,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(cnae_descricao), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(500))                                                             as cnae_description,

        cast(cnaes_secundarios_codigos as varchar(2000))                            as cnae_secondary_codes,
        cast(try_cast(cnaes_secundarios_count as int) as int)                       as cnae_secondary_count,

        -- classification
        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(setor_economico), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(100))                                                             as economic_sector,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(setor_macro), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(100))                                                             as macro_sector,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(setor_secundario_principal), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(200))                                                             as main_secondary_sector,

        cast(setores_secundarios as varchar(2000))                                  as secondary_sectors,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(setor_economico_origem), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(100))                                                             as economic_sector_source,

        -- registration status
        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(situacao_cadastral), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(100))                                                             as registration_status,

        cast(data_situacao_cadastral as date)                                        as date_registration_status,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(descricao_motivo_situacao_cadastral), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(300))                                                             as registration_status_reason,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(situacao_especial), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(200))                                                             as special_status,

        cast(data_situacao_especial as date)                                         as date_special_status,

        -- location
        cast(upper(uf) as varchar(5))                                                as uf,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(municipio), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(100))                                                             as municipality,

        cast(codigo_municipio_ibge as varchar(10))                                  as municipality_ibge_code,

        cast(TRIM(REPLACE(cep, '-', '')) as varchar(10))                            as cep,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(descricao_tipo_de_logradouro), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(100))                                                             as street_type,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(logradouro), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(300))                                                             as street_address,

        cast(numero as varchar(20))                                                  as street_number,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(complemento), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(200))                                                             as address_complement,

        CAST(NULLIF(
            (SELECT STRING_AGG(UPPER(LEFT(value,1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(value,2,LEN(value))), ' ')
             FROM STRING_SPLIT(TRIM(bairro), ' ')), '')
        AS varchar(200))                                                             as neighborhood,

        -- contact
        cast(ddd_telefone_1 as varchar(20))                                          as phone_1,
        cast(ddd_telefone_2 as varchar(20))                                          as phone_2,

        -- ingestion / source
        cast(transformed_at_bronze as datetime2)                                     as transformed_at_bronze,

        -- transformation timestamp
        current_timestamp                                                            as transformed_at_silver

    FROM source

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

model.save_data.silver_status_perdcomp_d.name: silver_status_perdcomp_delete_previsibility
model.save_data.silver_status_perdcomp_d.description: View da camada Silver com PER/DCOMPs excluídos das projeções de previsibilidade por status de cancelamento ou ausência de procuração. Originada do seed bronze_status_perdcomp_delete_previsibility. Filtra apenas os status 'Cancelado' e 'Sem Procuração'.

perdcomp.name: perdcomp
perdcomp.description: Número do PER/DCOMP sem pontuação (pontos e hífens removidos).

parceiro.name: parceiro
parceiro.description: Parceiro responsável pelo acompanhamento do pedido.

nome_empresa.name: nome_empresa
nome_empresa.description: Razão social da empresa titular do PER/DCOMP.

status.name: status
status.description: Status do PER/DCOMP que motivou a exclusão da projeção. Valores filtrados: Cancelado, Sem Procuração.

updated_status_at.name: updated_status_at
updated_status_at.description: Data e hora da última atualização do status na planilha de controle.

transformed_at_silver.name: transformed_at_silver
transformed_at_silver.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Silver foi executada.

model.save_data.silver_status_perdcomp_d.raw_code:
{{ config(materialized='view') }}

WITH source AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_status_perdcomp_delete_previsibility') }}
)

SELECT
    -- keys
    REPLACE(REPLACE(perdcomp, '.', ''), '-', '') AS perdcomp,

    -- business attributes
    parceiro,
    procurador,
    responsavel_tecnico,
    nome_empresa,
    tese,
    status,

    -- dates
    updated_at AS updated_status_at,

    -- transformation timestamp
    current_timestamp AS transformed_at_silver

FROM source
WHERE LOWER(status) IN ('cancelado', 'sem procuração')

model.save_data.silver_hubspot_deal.name: silver_hubspot_deal
model.save_data.silver_hubspot_deal.description: Modelo Silver com os negócios (deals) originados do HubSpot. Aplica tipagem, ajuste de timezone para UTC-3 e calcula campos derivados como tempo de ciclo e flag de negócio aberto. Base para análises comerciais e funil de vendas.

deal_id.name: deal_id
deal_id.description: Identificador único do negócio no HubSpot.

user_id.name: user_id
user_id.description: Identificador do usuário responsável (owner) pelo negócio.

team_id.name: team_id
team_id.description: Identificador da equipe responsável pelo negócio.

pipeline_id.name: pipeline_id
pipeline_id.description: Identificador do pipeline ao qual o negócio pertence.

pipeline_stage_id.name: pipeline_stage_id
pipeline_stage_id.description: Identificador da etapa atual do negócio no pipeline.

deal_name.name: deal_name
deal_name.description: Nome do negócio cadastrado no HubSpot.

create_date.name: create_date
create_date.description: Data e hora de criação do negócio, ajustada para UTC-3.

close_date.name: close_date
close_date.description: Data e hora de fechamento do negócio, ajustada para UTC-3. Quando nula, assume a data de criação.

deal_time.name: deal_time
deal_time.description: Tempo em dias entre a criação e o fechamento do negócio. Nulo quando as datas são iguais ou o fechamento não ocorreu.

deal_amount.name: deal_amount
deal_amount.description: Valor monetário do negócio em reais.

is_close_won.name: is_close_won
is_close_won.description: Indica se o negócio foi fechado como ganho (true/false).

flg_is_open.name: flg_is_open
flg_is_open.description: Flag que indica se o negócio ainda está em aberto (1 = aberto, 0 = fechado).

inserted_at.name: inserted_at
inserted_at.description: Data e hora em que o registro foi inserido na camada Bronze.

transformed_at_silver.name: transformed_at_silver
transformed_at_silver.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Silver foi executada.

model.save_data.silver_hubspot_deal.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized='table',
    post_hook=[
        "CREATE INDEX idx_hubspot_deal_deal_id ON {{ this }} (deal_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_hubspot_deal_user_id ON {{ this }} (user_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_hubspot_deal_pipeline_id ON {{ this }} (pipeline_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_hubspot_deal_pipeline_stage_id ON {{ this }} (pipeline_stage_id)"
    ]
) }}

WITH source AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_hubspot_deals') }}

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT
        -- keys
        cast(try_cast(hubspot_id as decimal(18,0)) as bigint)                   as deal_id,
        cast(try_cast(hubspot_owner_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)                as user_id,
        cast(try_cast(hubspot_team_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)                 as team_id,
        cast(try_cast(pipeline as decimal(18,2)) as int)                        as pipeline_id,
        cast(try_cast(dealstage as decimal(18,2)) as int)                       as pipeline_stage_id,

        -- business attributes
        cast(dealname as varchar(500))                                          as deal_name,
        dateadd(hour, -3, cast(createdate as datetime2))                        as create_date,
        case
            when closedate is not null
                then cast(dateadd(hour, -3, cast(closedate as datetime2)) as datetime2)
                else cast(dateadd(hour, -3, cast(createdate as datetime2)) as datetime2)
        end                                                                     as close_date,
        nullif(
            datediff(
                day,
                dateadd(hour, -3, cast(createdate as datetime2)),
                dateadd(hour, -3, cast(closedate as datetime2))
            ), 0
        )                                                                       as deal_time,
        cast(try_cast(coalesce(amount, 0) as decimal(18,2)) as decimal(18,2))   as deal_amount,
        cast(hs_is_closed_won as varchar(10))                                   as is_close_won,
        case when closedate is null then 1 else 0 end                           as flg_is_open,

        -- ingestion / source
        cast(inserted_at as datetime2)                                          as inserted_at,
        cast(system_source as varchar(100))                                     as system_source,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)                                    as transformed_at_silver

    FROM source

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

email.name: email
email.description: Endereço de e-mail do usuário, normalizado em minúsculas.

active_since.description: Data e hora de criação do usuário no HubSpot, ajustada para UTC-3.

inserted_at.description: Data e hora em que o registro foi inserido na camada Bronze.

model.save_data.silver_hubspot_user.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized='table',
    post_hook=[
        "CREATE INDEX idx_hubspot_user_user_id ON {{ this }} (user_id)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_hubspot_user_team_id ON {{ this }} (team_id)"
    ]
) }}

WITH source AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_hubspot_users') }}

),

teams AS (

    SELECT *
    FROM {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_hubspot_teams') }}

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT
        -- keys
        cast(try_cast(u.hubspot_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)                    as user_id,
        cast(try_cast(t.hubspot_id as decimal(18,2)) as int)                    as team_id,

        -- business attributes
        cast(concat(u.first_name, ' ', u.last_name) as varchar(255))           as user_name,
        cast(t.name as varchar(255))                                            as team_name,
        cast(trim(lower(u.email)) as varchar(255))                              as email,
        cast(u.first_name as varchar(255))                                      as first_name,
        cast(u.last_name as varchar(255))                                       as last_name,
        dateadd(hour, -3, cast(u.created_at_raw as datetime2))                  as active_since,

        -- ingestion / source
        cast(u.inserted_at as datetime2)                                        as inserted_at,
        cast(u.system_source as varchar(100))                                   as system_source,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp)                                    as transformed_at_silver

    FROM source u
    CROSS APPLY STRING_SPLIT(u.teams_ids, ',') team_ids
    LEFT JOIN teams t ON t.hubspot_id = team_ids.value

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

model.save_data.silver_omie_bandeiras_ca.name: silver_omie_bandeiras_cartao
model.save_data.silver_omie_bandeiras_ca.description: Modelo Silver com as bandeiras de cartão cadastradas no Omie. Consolida registros de duas unidades de negócio (SAVE INTELIGENCIA TRIBUTARIA e SAVE EDUCACAO) via UNION ALL, adicionando a coluna discriminadora bu. Passa integralmente as colunas da camada Bronze.

bu.name: bu
bu.description: Unidade de negócio de origem do registro ('SAVE INTELIGENCIA TRIBUTARIA' ou 'SAVE EDUCACAO').

omie_id.name: omie_id
omie_id.description: Identificador único do registro no Omie. Não é único neste modelo pois o mesmo ID pode existir em ambas as unidades de negócio.

inserted_at.name: inserted_at
inserted_at.description: Data e hora em que o registro foi inserido na camada Bronze.

transformed_at_silver.name: transformed_at_silver
transformed_at_silver.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Silver foi executada.

model.save_data.silver_omie_bandeiras_ca.compiled_code:
WITH source_sit AS (

    SELECT * FROM "save_database"."bronze"."bronze_omie_bandeiras_cartao"

),

source_edu AS (

    SELECT * FROM "save_database"."bronze"."bronze_omie_save_educacao_bandeiras_cartao"

),

uniao AS (

    SELECT cast('SAVE INTELIGENCIA TRIBUTARIA' as varchar(100)) as bu, s.*
    FROM source_sit s

    UNION ALL

    SELECT cast('SAVE EDUCACAO' as varchar(100)) as bu, s.*
    FROM source_edu s

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT
        u.*,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp) as transformed_at_silver

    FROM uniao u

)

model.save_data.silver_omie_contas_receb.compiled_code:
WITH source_sit AS (

    SELECT
        omie_id,
        -- colunas exclusivas de edu → NULL no sit
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))  as bloqueado,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))  as bloquear_baixa,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))  as bloquear_exclusao,
        boleto_cgerado,
        boleto_cnumbancario,
        boleto_cnumboleto,
        boleto_ddtembol,
        boleto_nperjuros,
        boleto_npermulta,
        categorias,
        codigo_categoria,
        codigo_cliente_fornecedor,
        codigo_lancamento_integracao,
        codigo_lancamento_omie,
        codigo_tipo_documento,
        codigo_vendedor,
        data_emissao,
        data_previsao,
        data_registro,
        data_vencimento,
        distribuicao,
        id_conta_corrente,
        id_origem,
        info_cimpapi,
        info_dalt,
        info_dinc,
        info_halt,
        info_hinc,
        info_ualt,
        info_uinc,
        ncodos,
        numero_documento,
        numero_documento_fiscal,
        numero_parcela,
        numero_pedido,
        operacao,
        retem_cofins,
        retem_csll,
        retem_inss,
        retem_ir,
        retem_iss,
        retem_pis,
        status_titulo,
        tipo_agrupamento,
        valor_documento,
        system_source,
        synced_at,
        inserted_at
    FROM "save_database"."bronze"."bronze_omie_contas_receber"

),

source_edu AS (

    SELECT
        omie_id,
        bloqueado,
        bloquear_baixa,
        bloquear_exclusao,
        boleto_cgerado,
        boleto_cnumbancario,
        boleto_cnumboleto,
        boleto_ddtembol,
        boleto_nperjuros,
        boleto_npermulta,
        categorias,
        codigo_categoria,
        codigo_cliente_fornecedor,
        codigo_lancamento_integracao,
        codigo_lancamento_omie,
        codigo_tipo_documento,
        -- colunas exclusivas de sit → NULL no edu
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))           as codigo_vendedor,
        cast(data_emissao   as nvarchar(50))  as data_emissao,    -- date em edu, nvarchar em sit
        cast(data_previsao  as nvarchar(50))  as data_previsao,
        cast(data_registro  as nvarchar(50))  as data_registro,
        cast(data_vencimento as nvarchar(50)) as data_vencimento,
        distribuicao,
        id_conta_corrente,
        id_origem,
        info_cimpapi,
        cast(info_dalt as nvarchar(50))       as info_dalt,
        cast(info_dinc as nvarchar(50))       as info_dinc,
        info_halt,
        info_hinc,
        info_ualt,
        info_uinc,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))           as ncodos,
        numero_documento,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))           as numero_documento_fiscal,
        numero_parcela,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))           as numero_pedido,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))           as operacao,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))           as retem_cofins,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))           as retem_csll,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))           as retem_inss,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))           as retem_ir,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))           as retem_iss,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))           as retem_pis,
        status_titulo,
        tipo_agrupamento,
        valor_documento,
        system_source,
        synced_at,
        inserted_at
    FROM "save_database"."bronze"."bronze_omie_save_educacao_contas_receber"

),

uniao AS (

    SELECT cast('SAVE INTELIGENCIA TRIBUTARIA' as varchar(100)) as bu, s.*
    FROM source_sit s

    UNION ALL

    SELECT cast('SAVE EDUCACAO' as varchar(100)) as bu, s.*
    FROM source_edu s

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT
        u.*,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp) as transformed_at_silver

    FROM uniao u

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

model.save_data.silver_omie_departamento.name: silver_omie_departamentos
model.save_data.silver_omie_departamento.description: Modelo Silver com os departamentos cadastrados no Omie. Consolida registros de duas unidades de negócio (SAVE INTELIGENCIA TRIBUTARIA e SAVE EDUCACAO) via UNION ALL, adicionando a coluna discriminadora bu. Passa integralmente as colunas da camada Bronze.

transformed_at_silver.name: transformed_at_silver
transformed_at_silver.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Silver foi executada.

model.save_data.silver_omie_movimentos_f.name: silver_omie_movimentos_financeiros

Base para análise de fluxo de caixa e liquidação de títulos.

ordemservico_ncodigoos.name: ordemservico_ncodigoos
ordemservico_ncodigoos.description: Código da Ordem de Serviço vinculada à NFS-e no Omie.

ordemservico_nnumeroos.description: Número da Ordem de Serviço vinculada à NFS-e.

model.save_data.silver_omie_nfse.raw_code:
{{ config(
    materialized='table',
    post_hook=[
        "CREATE INDEX idx_omie_nfse_bu ON {{ this }} (bu)",
        "CREATE INDEX idx_omie_nfse_inserted_at ON {{ this }} (inserted_at)"
    ]
) }}

WITH source_sit AS (

    SELECT
        omie_id,
        adicionais_ccodigocategoria,
        adicionais_ncodigocc,
        adicionais_ncodigovendedor,
        alteracao_cdataalteracao,
        alteracao_choraalteracao,
        alteracao_cusuarioalteracao,
        cabecalho_cambientenfse,
        -- coluna exclusiva de edu → NULL no sit
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))  as cabecalho_ccnpjdestinatario,
        cabecalho_ccpfdestinatario,
        cabecalho_ccnpjemissor,
        cabecalho_ccidadeemissor,
        cabecalho_ccodmundestinatario,
        cabecalho_ccodmunemissor,
        cabecalho_ccodigoverifnfse,
        cabecalho_cimemissor,
        cabecalho_crazaodestinatario,
        cabecalho_crazaoemissor,
        cabecalho_cserienfse,
        cabecalho_cstatusnfse,
        -- coluna exclusiva de edu → NULL no sit
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))  as cabecalho_nchavenfe,
        cabecalho_ncodnf,
        cabecalho_ncodigocliente,
        cabecalho_nnumeronfse,
        cabecalho_nvalornfse,
        cancelamento_cdatacancelamento,
        cancelamento_choracancelamento,
        cancelamento_cmotivocancelamento,
        cancelamento_cusuariocancelamento,
        emissao_cdataemissao,
        emissao_choraemissao,
        emissao_cusuarioemissao,
        inclusao_cdatainclusao,
        inclusao_chorainclusao,
        inclusao_cusuarioinclusao,
        listaservicos,
        ordemservico_ncodigoos,
        ordemservico_nnumeroos,
        ordemservico_nvaloros,
        rps_cprotocolorps,
        rps_cserierps,
        rps_cstatusrps,
        rps_nnumerolote,
        rps_nnumerorps,
        rps_nstatuslote,
        servicos_cidadeprestacao,
        valores_cissretido,
        -- colunas exclusivas de edu (impostos detalhados) → NULL no sit
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(50))   as valores_nvalorcofins,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(50))   as valores_nvalorcsll,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(50))   as valores_nvalorir,
        valores_nvalorliquido,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(50))   as valores_nvalorpis,
        valores_nvalortotalservicos,
        system_source,
        synced_at,
        inserted_at
    FROM {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_omie_nfse') }}

),

source_edu AS (

    SELECT
        omie_id,
        adicionais_ccodigocategoria,
        adicionais_ncodigocc,
        adicionais_ncodigovendedor,
        cast(alteracao_cdataalteracao as nvarchar(50))    as alteracao_cdataalteracao,  -- date em edu, nvarchar em sit
        alteracao_choraalteracao,
        alteracao_cusuarioalteracao,
        cabecalho_cambientenfse,
        cabecalho_ccnpjdestinatario,
        -- coluna exclusiva de sit → NULL no edu
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))                       as cabecalho_ccpfdestinatario,
        cabecalho_ccnpjemissor,
        cabecalho_ccidadeemissor,
        cabecalho_ccodmundestinatario,
        cabecalho_ccodmunemissor,
        cabecalho_ccodigoverifnfse,
        cabecalho_cimemissor,
        cabecalho_crazaodestinatario,
        cabecalho_crazaoemissor,
        -- coluna exclusiva de sit → NULL no edu
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))                       as cabecalho_cserienfse,
        cabecalho_cstatusnfse,
        cabecalho_nchavenfe,
        cabecalho_ncodnf,
        cabecalho_ncodigocliente,
        cabecalho_nnumeronfse,
        cast(cabecalho_nvalornfse as nvarchar(50))        as cabecalho_nvalornfse,      -- float em edu, nvarchar em sit
        -- colunas de cancelamento exclusivas de sit → NULL no edu
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))                       as cancelamento_cdatacancelamento,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))                       as cancelamento_choracancelamento,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))                       as cancelamento_cmotivocancelamento,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))                       as cancelamento_cusuariocancelamento,
        cast(emissao_cdataemissao  as nvarchar(50))       as emissao_cdataemissao,      -- date em edu, nvarchar em sit
        emissao_choraemissao,
        emissao_cusuarioemissao,
        cast(inclusao_cdatainclusao as nvarchar(50))      as inclusao_cdatainclusao,    -- date em edu, nvarchar em sit
        inclusao_chorainclusao,
        inclusao_cusuarioinclusao,
        listaservicos,
        ordemservico_ncodigoos,
        ordemservico_nnumeroos,
        cast(ordemservico_nvaloros as nvarchar(50))       as ordemservico_nvaloros,     -- float em edu, nvarchar em sit
        rps_cprotocolorps,
        rps_cserierps,
        rps_cstatusrps,
        rps_nnumerolote,
        rps_nnumerorps,
        rps_nstatuslote,
        servicos_cidadeprestacao,
        valores_cissretido,
        cast(valores_nvalorcofins as nvarchar(50))        as valores_nvalorcofins,
        cast(valores_nvalorcsll   as nvarchar(50))        as valores_nvalorcsll,
        cast(valores_nvalorir     as nvarchar(50))        as valores_nvalorir,
        cast(valores_nvalorliquido as nvarchar(50))       as valores_nvalorliquido,     -- float em edu, nvarchar em sit
        cast(valores_nvalorpis    as nvarchar(50))        as valores_nvalorpis,
        cast(valores_nvalortotalservicos as nvarchar(50)) as valores_nvalortotalservicos,
        system_source,
        synced_at,
        inserted_at
    FROM {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_omie_save_educacao_nfse') }}

),

uniao AS (

    SELECT cast('SAVE INTELIGENCIA TRIBUTARIA' as varchar(100)) as bu, s.*
    FROM source_sit s

    UNION ALL

    SELECT cast('SAVE EDUCACAO' as varchar(100)) as bu, s.*
    FROM source_edu s

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT
        u.*,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp) as transformed_at_silver

    FROM uniao u

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

model.save_data.silver_omie_os.name: silver_omie_os
model.save_data.silver_omie_os.description: Modelo Silver com as Ordens de Serviço (OS) registradas no Omie. Consolida registros de duas unidades de negócio (SAVE INTELIGENCIA TRIBUTARIA e SAVE EDUCACAO) via UNION ALL com alinhamento de colunas exclusivas por BU via NULL cast. Base para análise do ciclo de serviços prestados, faturamento e status operacional.

bu.name: bu
bu.description: Unidade de negócio de origem do registro ('SAVE INTELIGENCIA TRIBUTARIA' ou 'SAVE EDUCACAO').

omie_id.name: omie_id
omie_id.description: Identificador interno da OS no Omie. Não é único neste modelo pois o mesmo ID pode existir em ambas as unidades de negócio.

cabecalho_ncodos.name: cabecalho_ncodos
cabecalho_ncodos.description: Código interno da OS no Omie.

cabecalho_cetapa.name: cabecalho_cetapa
cabecalho_cetapa.description: Etapa atual da OS no fluxo de faturamento do Omie.

cabecalho_ncodcli.name: cabecalho_ncodcli
cabecalho_ncodcli.description: Código do cliente vinculado à OS.

cabecalho_ncodvend.name: cabecalho_ncodvend
cabecalho_ncodvend.description: Código do vendedor responsável pela OS.

cabecalho_ddtprevisao.name: cabecalho_ddtprevisao
cabecalho_ddtprevisao.description: Data prevista de conclusão ou entrega da OS.

cabecalho_nqtdeparc.name: cabecalho_nqtdeparc
cabecalho_nqtdeparc.description: Número de parcelas do faturamento da OS.

infocadastro_cfaturada.name: infocadastro_cfaturada
infocadastro_cfaturada.description: Indica se a OS foi faturada (S/N).

infocadastro_ccancelada.name: infocadastro_ccancelada
infocadastro_ccancelada.description: Indica se a OS foi cancelada (S/N).

infocadastro_ddtinc.name: infocadastro_ddtinc
infocadastro_ddtinc.description: Data de inclusão da OS no Omie.

infocadastro_ddtcanc.name: infocadastro_ddtcanc
infocadastro_ddtcanc.description: Data de cancelamento da OS, quando aplicável.

informacoesadicionais_ccodcateg.name: informacoesadicionais_ccodcateg
informacoesadicionais_ccodcateg.description: Código da categoria DRE associada à OS.

informacoesadicionais_ncodcc.name: informacoesadicionais_ncodcc
informacoesadicionais_ncodcc.description: Código da conta corrente de recebimento associada à OS.

departamentos.name: departamentos
departamentos.description: JSON com a distribuição por departamentos associada à OS.

parcelas.name: parcelas
parcelas.description: JSON com as parcelas de pagamento da OS.

servicosprestados.name: servicosprestados
servicosprestados.description: JSON com os serviços prestados descritos na OS.

synced_at.name: synced_at
synced_at.description: Data e hora da última sincronização do registro com o Omie.

inserted_at.name: inserted_at
inserted_at.description: Data e hora em que o registro foi inserido na camada Bronze.

transformed_at_silver.name: transformed_at_silver
transformed_at_silver.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Silver foi executada.

        parcelas,

        cabecalho_ncodvend,
        cabecalho_nqtdeparc,
        cabecalho_nvalortotal,
        cast(cabecalho_nvalortotalimpret   as nvarchar(50))  as cabecalho_nvalortotalimpret,  -- float em edu, nvarchar em sit
        departamentos,
        email_cenvboleto,
        email_cenvlink,
        email_cenvpix,
        email_cenvrecibo,
        email_cenvviaunica,
        email_cenviarpara,
        infocadastro_cambiente,
        infocadastro_ccancelada,
        infocadastro_cfaturada,
        infocadastro_chralt,
        infocadastro_chrfat,
        infocadastro_chrinc,
        infocadastro_corigem,
        cast(infocadastro_ddtalt          as nvarchar(50))  as infocadastro_ddtalt,           -- date em edu, nvarchar em sit
        cast(infocadastro_ddtfat          as nvarchar(50))  as infocadastro_ddtfat,
        cast(infocadastro_ddtinc          as nvarchar(50))  as infocadastro_ddtinc,
        infocadastro_ualt,
        infocadastro_uinc,
        informacoesadicionais_ccidprestserv,
        informacoesadicionais_ccodcateg,
        informacoesadicionais_ncodcc,
        observacoes_cobsos,
        parcelas,
        servicosprestados,
        system_source,
        synced_at,
        inserted_at,
        infocadastro_chrcanc,
        cast(infocadastro_ddtcanc         as nvarchar(50))  as infocadastro_ddtcanc,          -- date em edu, nvarchar em sit
        informacoesadicionais_cusoconsumo
    FROM {{ source('bronze', 'bronze_omie_save_educacao_os') }}

),

uniao AS (

    SELECT cast('SAVE INTELIGENCIA TRIBUTARIA' as varchar(100)) as bu, s.*
    FROM source_sit s

    UNION ALL

    SELECT cast('SAVE EDUCACAO' as varchar(100)) as bu, s.*
    FROM source_edu s

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT
        u.*,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp) as transformed_at_silver

    FROM uniao u

)

FROM transformer

        email_cenviarpara,
        infocadastro_cambiente,
        infocadastro_ccancelada,
        infocadastro_cfaturada,
        infocadastro_chralt,
        infocadastro_chrfat,
        infocadastro_chrinc,
        infocadastro_corigem,
        infocadastro_ddtalt,
        infocadastro_ddtfat,
        infocadastro_ddtinc,
        infocadastro_ualt,
        infocadastro_uinc,
        informacoesadicionais_ccidprestserv,
        informacoesadicionais_ccodcateg,
        informacoesadicionais_ncodcc,
        -- colunas exclusivas de edu → NULL no sit
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))  as observacoes_cobsos,
        parcelas,
        servicosprestados,
        system_source,
        synced_at,
        inserted_at,
        infocadastro_chrcanc,
        infocadastro_ddtcanc,
        cast(NULL as nvarchar(255))  as informacoesadicionais_cusoconsumo
    FROM "save_database"."bronze"."bronze_omie_os"

),

source_edu AS (

    SELECT
        omie_id,
        cabecalho_ccodintos,
        cabecalho_ccodparc,
        cabecalho_cetapa,
        cabecalho_cnumos,
        cast(cabecalho_ddtprevisao        as nvarchar(50))  as cabecalho_ddtprevisao,       -- date em edu, nvarchar em sit
        cabecalho_ncodcli,
        cabecalho_ncodos,
        cabecalho_ncodvend,
        cabecalho_nqtdeparc,
        cabecalho_nvalortotal,
        cast(cabecalho_nvalortotalimpret   as nvarchar(50))  as cabecalho_nvalortotalimpret,  -- float em edu, nvarchar em sit
        departamentos,
        email_cenvboleto,
        email_cenvlink,
        email_cenvpix,
        email_cenvrecibo,
        email_cenvviaunica,
        email_cenviarpara,
        infocadastro_cambiente,
        infocadastro_ccancelada,
        infocadastro_cfaturada,
        infocadastro_chralt,
        infocadastro_chrfat,
        infocadastro_chrinc,
        infocadastro_corigem,
        cast(infocadastro_ddtalt          as nvarchar(50))  as infocadastro_ddtalt,           -- date em edu, nvarchar em sit
        cast(infocadastro_ddtfat          as nvarchar(50))  as infocadastro_ddtfat,
        cast(infocadastro_ddtinc          as nvarchar(50))  as infocadastro_ddtinc,
        infocadastro_ualt,
        infocadastro_uinc,
        informacoesadicionais_ccidprestserv,
        informacoesadicionais_ccodcateg,
        informacoesadicionais_ncodcc,
        observacoes_cobsos,
        parcelas,
        servicosprestados,
        system_source,
        synced_at,
        inserted_at,
        infocadastro_chrcanc,
        cast(infocadastro_ddtcanc         as nvarchar(50))  as infocadastro_ddtcanc,          -- date em edu, nvarchar em sit
        informacoesadicionais_cusoconsumo
    FROM "save_database"."bronze"."bronze_omie_save_educacao_os"

),

uniao AS (

    SELECT cast('SAVE INTELIGENCIA TRIBUTARIA' as varchar(100)) as bu, s.*
    FROM source_sit s

    UNION ALL

    SELECT cast('SAVE EDUCACAO' as varchar(100)) as bu, s.*
    FROM source_edu s

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT
        u.*,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp) as transformed_at_silver

    FROM uniao u

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

model.save_data.silver_omie_portadores.name: silver_omie_portadores
model.save_data.silver_omie_portadores.description: Modelo Silver com os portadores (contas bancárias e caixas) cadastrados no Omie. Disponível apenas para a unidade SAVE INTELIGENCIA TRIBUTARIA. Passa integralmente as colunas da camada Bronze com a coluna bu fixada.

bu.name: bu
bu.description: Unidade de negócio de origem do registro. Fixo como 'SAVE INTELIGENCIA TRIBUTARIA' para este modelo.

omie_id.name: omie_id
omie_id.description: Identificador único do portador no Omie.

inserted_at.name: inserted_at
inserted_at.description: Data e hora em que o registro foi inserido na camada Bronze.

transformed_at_silver.name: transformed_at_silver
transformed_at_silver.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Silver foi executada.

model.save_data.silver_omie_portadores.compiled_code:
WITH source AS (

    SELECT * FROM "save_database"."bronze"."bronze_omie_portadores"

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT
        cast('SAVE INTELIGENCIA TRIBUTARIA' as varchar(100)) as bu,
        s.*,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp) as transformed_at_silver

    FROM source s

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

model.save_data.silver_omie_tipos_contas.name: silver_omie_tipos_contas_correntes
model.save_data.silver_omie_tipos_contas.description: Modelo Silver com os tipos de contas correntes cadastrados no Omie. Consolida registros de duas unidades de negócio (SAVE INTELIGENCIA TRIBUTARIA e SAVE EDUCACAO) via UNION ALL, adicionando a coluna discriminadora bu. Passa integralmente as colunas da camada Bronze.

bu.name: bu
bu.description: Unidade de negócio de origem do registro ('SAVE INTELIGENCIA TRIBUTARIA' ou 'SAVE EDUCACAO').

omie_id.name: omie_id
omie_id.description: Identificador único do registro no Omie. Não é único neste modelo pois o mesmo ID pode existir em ambas as unidades de negócio.

inserted_at.name: inserted_at
inserted_at.description: Data e hora em que o registro foi inserido na camada Bronze.

transformed_at_silver.name: transformed_at_silver
transformed_at_silver.description: Data e hora em que a transformação da camada Silver foi executada.

model.save_data.silver_omie_tipos_contas.compiled_code:
WITH source_sit AS (

    SELECT * FROM "save_database"."bronze"."bronze_omie_tipos_contas_correntes"

),

source_edu AS (

    SELECT * FROM "save_database"."bronze"."bronze_omie_save_educacao_tipos_contas_correntes"

),

uniao AS (

    SELECT cast('SAVE INTELIGENCIA TRIBUTARIA' as varchar(100)) as bu, s.*
    FROM source_sit s

    UNION ALL

    SELECT cast('SAVE EDUCACAO' as varchar(100)) as bu, s.*
    FROM source_edu s

),

transformer AS (

    SELECT
        u.*,

        -- transformation timestamp (obrigatório)
        dateadd(hour, -3, current_timestamp) as transformed_at_silver

    FROM uniao u

)

SELECT *
FROM transformer

macro.dbt_sqlserver.sqlserver__get_catal.name: sqlserver__get_catalog
macro.dbt_sqlserver.sqlserver__get_catal.macro_sql:
{% macro sqlserver__get_catalog(information_schemas, schemas) -%}
    {% set query_label = get_query_options() %}
    {%- call statement('catalog', fetch_result=True) -%}
        {{ get_use_database_sql(information_schemas.database) }}
        with
        principals as (
            select
                name as principal_name,
                principal_id as principal_id
            from
                sys.database_principals {{ information_schema_hints() }}
        ),

        schemas as (
            select
                name as schema_name,
                schema_id as schema_id,
                principal_id as principal_id
            from
                sys.schemas {{ information_schema_hints() }}
        ),

        tables as (
            select
                object_id,
                name as table_name,
                schema_id as schema_id,
                principal_id as principal_id,
                'BASE TABLE' as table_type
            from
                sys.tables {{ information_schema_hints() }}
        ),

        tables_with_metadata as (
            select
                object_id,
                table_name,
                schema_name,
                coalesce(tables.principal_id, schemas.principal_id) as owner_principal_id,
                table_type
            from
                tables
            join schemas on tables.schema_id = schemas.schema_id
        ),

        views as (
            select
                object_id,
                name as table_name,
                schema_id as schema_id,
                principal_id as principal_id,
                'VIEW' as table_type
            from
                sys.views {{ information_schema_hints() }}
        ),

        views_with_metadata as (
            select
                object_id,
                table_name,
                schema_name,
                coalesce(views.principal_id, schemas.principal_id) as owner_principal_id,
                table_type
            from
                views
            join schemas on views.schema_id = schemas.schema_id
        ),

        tables_and_views as (
            select
                object_id,
                table_name,
                schema_name,
                principal_name,
                table_type
            from
                tables_with_metadata
            join principals on tables_with_metadata.owner_principal_id = principals.principal_id
            union all
            select
                object_id,
                table_name,
                schema_name,
                principal_name,
                table_type
            from
                views_with_metadata
            join principals on views_with_metadata.owner_principal_id = principals.principal_id
        ),

        cols as (

            select
                c.object_id,
                c.name as column_name,
                c.column_id as column_index,
                t.name as column_type
            from sys.columns as c {{ information_schema_hints() }}
            left join sys.types as t {{ information_schema_hints() }} on c.system_type_id = t.system_type_id
        )

        select
            DB_NAME() as table_database,
            tv.schema_name as table_schema,
            tv.table_name,
            tv.table_type,
            null as table_comment,
            tv.principal_name as table_owner,
            cols.column_name,
            cols.column_index,
            cols.column_type,
            null as column_comment
        from tables_and_views tv
        join cols on tv.object_id = cols.object_id
        where ({%- for schema in schemas -%}
            upper(tv.schema_name) = upper('{{ schema }}'){%- if not loop.last %} or {% endif -%}
        {%- endfor -%})

        order by column_index
        {{ query_label }}

        {%- endcall -%}

    {{ return(load_result('catalog').table) }}

{%- endmacro %}

macro.dbt_sqlserver.sqlserver__get_catal.name: sqlserver__get_catalog_relations
macro.dbt_sqlserver.sqlserver__get_catal.macro_sql:
{% macro sqlserver__get_catalog_relations(information_schema, relations) -%}
    {% set query_label = get_query_options() %}
    {%- set distinct_databases = relations | map(attribute='database') | unique | list -%}

    {%- if distinct_databases | length == 1 -%}
        {%- call statement('catalog', fetch_result=True) -%}
            {{ get_use_database_sql(distinct_databases[0]) }}
            with
            principals as (
                select
                    name as principal_name,
                    principal_id as principal_id
                from
                    sys.database_principals {{ information_schema_hints() }}
            ),

            schemas as (
                select
                    name as schema_name,
                    schema_id as schema_id,
                    principal_id as principal_id
                from
                    sys.schemas {{ information_schema_hints() }}
            ),

            tables as (
                select
                    object_id,
                    name as table_name,
                    schema_id as schema_id,
                    principal_id as principal_id,
                    'BASE TABLE' as table_type
                from
                    sys.tables {{ information_schema_hints() }}
            ),

            tables_with_metadata as (
                select
                    object_id,
                    table_name,
                    schema_name,
                    coalesce(tables.principal_id, schemas.principal_id) as owner_principal_id,
                    table_type
                from
                    tables
                join schemas on tables.schema_id = schemas.schema_id
            ),

            views as (
                select
                    object_id,
                    name as table_name,
                    schema_id as schema_id,
                    principal_id as principal_id,
                    'VIEW' as table_type
                from
                    sys.views {{ information_schema_hints() }}
            ),

            views_with_metadata as (
                select
                    object_id,
                    table_name,
                    schema_name,
                    coalesce(views.principal_id, schemas.principal_id) as owner_principal_id,
                    table_type
                from
                    views
                join schemas on views.schema_id = schemas.schema_id
            ),

            tables_and_views as (
                select
                    object_id,
                    table_name,
                    schema_name,
                    principal_name,
                    table_type
                from
                    tables_with_metadata
                join principals on tables_with_metadata.owner_principal_id = principals.principal_id
                union all
                select
                    object_id,
                    table_name,
                    schema_name,
                    principal_name,
                    table_type
                from
                    views_with_metadata
                join principals on views_with_metadata.owner_principal_id = principals.principal_id
            ),

            cols as (

                select
                    c.object_id,
                    c.name as column_name,
                    c.column_id as column_index,
                    t.name as column_type
                from sys.columns as c {{ information_schema_hints() }}
                left join sys.types as t on c.system_type_id = t.system_type_id
            )

            select
                DB_NAME() as table_database,
                tv.schema_name as table_schema,
                tv.table_name,
                tv.table_type,
                null as table_comment,
                tv.principal_name as table_owner,
                cols.column_name,
                cols.column_index,
                cols.column_type,
                null as column_comment
            from tables_and_views tv
            join cols on tv.object_id = cols.object_id
            where (
                {%- for relation in relations -%}
                    {% if relation.schema and relation.identifier %}
                        (
                            upper(tv.schema_name) = upper('{{ relation.schema }}')
                            and upper(tv.table_name) = upper('{{ relation.identifier }}')
                        )
                    {% elif relation.schema %}
                        (
                            upper(tv.schema_name) = upper('{{ relation.schema }}')
                        )
                    {% else %}
                        {% do exceptions.raise_compiler_error(
                            '`get_catalog_relations` requires a list of relations, each with a schema'
                        ) %}
                    {% endif %}

                    {%- if not loop.last %} or {% endif -%}
                {%- endfor -%}
            )

            order by column_index
            {{ query_label }}

        {%- endcall -%}
        {{ return(load_result('catalog').table) }}
    {% else %}
        {% do exceptions.raise_compiler_error(
            '`get_catalog_relations` can catalog one database at a time'
        ) %}
    {% endif %}

{%- endmacro %}

macro.dbt_sqlserver.sqlserver__list_nonc.name: sqlserver__list_nonclustered_rowstore_indexes
macro.dbt_sqlserver.sqlserver__list_nonc.macro_sql:
{% macro sqlserver__list_nonclustered_rowstore_indexes(relation) -%}
  {% call statement('list_nonclustered_rowstore_indexes', fetch_result=True) -%}

    SELECT i.name AS index_name
    , i.name + '__dbt_backup' as index_new_name
    , COL_NAME(ic.object_id,ic.column_id) AS column_name
    FROM sys.indexes AS i
    INNER JOIN sys.index_columns AS ic
        ON i.object_id = ic.object_id AND i.index_id = ic.index_id and i.type <> 5
    WHERE i.object_id = OBJECT_ID('{{ relation.schema }}.{{ relation.identifier }}')

    UNION ALL

    SELECT  obj.name AS index_name
    , obj.name + '__dbt_backup' as index_new_name
    , col1.name AS column_name
    FROM sys.foreign_key_columns fkc
    INNER JOIN sys.objects obj
        ON obj.object_id = fkc.constraint_object_id
    INNER JOIN sys.tables tab1
        ON tab1.object_id = fkc.parent_object_id
    INNER JOIN sys.schemas sch
        ON tab1.schema_id = sch.schema_id
    INNER JOIN sys.columns col1
        ON col1.column_id = parent_column_id AND col1.object_id = tab1.object_id
    INNER JOIN sys.tables tab2
        ON tab2.object_id = fkc.referenced_object_id
    INNER JOIN sys.columns col2
        ON col2.column_id = referenced_column_id AND col2.object_id = tab2.object_id
    WHERE sch.name = '{{ relation.schema }}' and tab1.name = '{{ relation.identifier }}'

  {% endcall %}
  {{ return(load_result('list_nonclustered_rowstore_indexes').table) }}
{% endmacro %}

doc.dbt.__overview__.name: __overview__
doc.dbt.__overview__.block_contents:
### Welcome!

Welcome to the auto-generated documentation for your dbt project!

### Navigation

You can use the `Project` and `Database` navigation tabs on the left side of the window to explore the models
in your project.

#### Project Tab
The `Project` tab mirrors the directory structure of your dbt project. In this tab, you can see all of the
models defined in your dbt project, as well as models imported from dbt packages.

#### Database Tab
The `Database` tab also exposes your models, but in a format that looks more like a database explorer. This view
shows relations (tables and views) grouped into database schemas. Note that ephemeral models are _not_ shown
in this interface, as they do not exist in the database.

### Graph Exploration
You can click the blue icon on the bottom-right corner of the page to view the lineage graph of your models.

On model pages, you'll see the immediate parents and children of the model you're exploring. By clicking the `Expand`
button at the top-right of this lineage pane, you'll be able to see all of the models that are used to build,
or are built from, the model you're exploring.

Once expanded, you'll be able to use the `--select` and `--exclude` model selection syntax to filter the
models in the graph. For more information on model selection, check out the [dbt docs](https://docs.getdbt.com/docs/model-selection-syntax).

Note that you can also right-click on models to interactively filter and explore the graph.

---

### More information

- [What is dbt](https://docs.getdbt.com/docs/introduction)?
- Read the [dbt viewpoint](https://docs.getdbt.com/docs/viewpoint)
- [Installation](https://docs.getdbt.com/docs/installation)
- Join the [dbt Community](https://www.getdbt.com/community/) for questions and discussion
